title: Account Manager / Campaign Strategist (Client Success & Growth)
description:
About StoryGen



StoryGen (www.storygen.agency/) is a B2B lead generation agency focused on building predictable outbound pipelines for growing companies.



We design and operate cold-calling-led outbound programs supported by structured processes, performance tracking, and AI-driven tools. Our goal is simple: help clients generate consistent, high-quality opportunities at scale.



We work hands-on with each client to turn outbound into a reliable growth channel, not just a one-off effort.



About the Role

We’re looking for a Remote Account Manager / Campaign Strategist who can take ownership of client campaigns end-to-end process from strategy creation to ongoing performance improvement.



This role goes beyond traditional account management. You’ll be responsible for driving results, aligning teams, and guiding clients using data and insights.



If you’re someone who understands outbound deeply and enjoys connecting strategy with execution, this role will suit you well.



Key Responsibilities

Client Strategy & Partnership

- Lead onboarding sessions and campaign launches with confidence

- Turn client goals into clear, executable plans

- Facilitate regular performance reviews and strategic discussions

- Build strong client relationships through consistent delivery and communication



Campaign Strategy & Iteration

- Define Ideal Customer Profiles (ICPs) and targeting approaches

- Develop and improve cold calling scripts and
 messaging

- Use campaign data and BDR insights to refine outreach strategies

- Identify areas for improvement and implement optimization plans



Cross-Team Coordination

- Provide clear direction to BDR teams on messaging and targeting

- Collaborate with list building team to ensure accurate, high-quality data

- Work closely with operations team to improve workflows and systems

- Monitor campaign performance and make timely adjustments



Reporting & Insights

- Track and analyze key campaign metrics

- Deliver clear, actionable updates to clients

- Translate data into recommendations and next steps



What We’re Looking For

- 1to 2 years of hands-on B2B cold calling experience

- 2+ years in Account Management, Client Success, or Campaign Management (B2B, lead gen, or sales outsourcing preferred)

- Strong copywriting and scripting skills for outbound campaigns

- Solid understanding of ICP creation and outbound strategy

- Confident communicator who can lead client conversations effectively

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple campaigns

- Comfortable working remotely using tools like HubSpot, Slack, Coda, Calendly, Nooks, Aircall, etc.

- Familiar with using AI tools to improve efficiency and workflows



Compensation & Benefits

- Base Salary: USD 1,500/month

- On-Target Earnings: Up to USD 2,000/month (performance-based)

- Fully remote, work with global team

- Structured systems and strong operational support

- Opportunity to grow as the company scales



Work Schedule

- Monday to Friday

- 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (Eastern Time)



Application Process

We use structured assessments to ensure a fair and objective hiring process.



To apply, complete the assessment and upload the following in the same link:



- Resume

- Internet speed test result

- Short Loom audio introduction (guide questions will be provided in the same link)



APPLY HERE:

title: WordPress Tech & Website Builder (Part-Time, US Agency)
description:
Part-Time WordPress Tech / Website Manager & Builder



Hey! I'm Marina, owner of a small web design agency based in the US (WebTree Creative). I build and manage WordPress websites for small businesses and nonprofits, everything from local contractors to chambers of commerce. We are a small team and have hit the point where we genuinely need a reliable tech person by my side.



This is a part-time, long-term role, about 20 hours per week to start, with the potential to grow. I'm not looking for someone to just follow a checklist. I want someone who actually gets WordPress, can troubleshoot when things go sideways, and communicates clearly when something is wrong.





WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY BE DOING



Website Builds



This is a big part of the role and I want to be upfront: I have high standards here. I have seen a lot of sloppy Elementor work in this industry, inconsistent spacing, fonts that don't match the design, sections that fall apart on mobile, and that is not what we do. When I hand you a Figma file or a design reference, I expect the final site to match it as closely as possible. Pixel-perfect is the goal, not "close enough.". Of course there's flexibility within reason. 



Specifically, you will be:



- Building full WordPress sites from Figma designs and other design references, matching layouts, typography, spacing, colors, and interactions faithfully

- Setting up Elementor theme builder properly, headers, footers, single templates, archive pages, not just dropping widgets on pages

- Building with a clean, consistent structure: global colors, global fonts, reusable sections, no inline style chaos

- Making sure every build is genuinely responsive, not just "it works on mobile" but actually looks intentional and polished on every screen size

- Optimizing images and build structure for performance, we do not ship bloated sites

- Handing off sites that are easy for clients to edit without breaking everything



Ongoing Site Management



- WordPress plugin and theme updates across multiple client sites (we use WP Engine for hosting)

- Troubleshooting
 delivery issues, we use FluentSMTP and Brevo to send transactional

- DNS management, pointing domains, setting up Cloudflare, troubleshooting propagation issues

- Helping onboard new client sites, installing plugins, configuring settings, running test
s

- Monitoring for security issues, spam form submissions, and anything that looks off

- Occasionally setting up or fixing Google Apps Script automations or Zapier/Make workflows

- Communicating with clients directly when needed (professional, friendly tone required)





YOU ARE A GREAT FIT IF YOU...



- Have built real, polished websites in Elementor Pro — not just edited templates, but built from scratch from a design file

- Understand Elementor's global settings, theme builder, dynamic content, and custom CSS — and know when to use each one

- Can look at a Figma file and translate it to a live site accurately, not approximately

- Know WP Engine inside and out, environments, SFTP, staging, logs

- Understand how
 deliverability works, SPF, DKIM, DMARC, SMTP setup

- Are comfortable in Cloudflare, DNS records, proxying, bot protection

- Can read an error message and figure out what it means without panicking

- Have worked with a US-based agency or client before

- Communicate proactively, if something is broken or you are not sure, you say so immediately

- Are available during some US business hours (Mountain Time preferred, but flexible for the right person)





NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED)



- Familiarity with Google Search Console and basic SEO

- Experience with Asana, Slack, or similar project management tools

- Basic PHP for small customizations





WHAT WORKING WITH ME IS LIKE



I'm direct, low-drama, and I appreciate the same. I will not micromanage you, I trust people to do their job. But I do expect clean work, clear communication, and honesty when something is not working or you are not sure how to do something. My clients are real small businesses who depend on their websites, so reliability and quality matter a lot to me.



I will start you on a couple of sites to get a feel for how we work together, and we will grow from there. I pay on time, every time.



TO APPLY, please start your message with the word Blueberry and include:

- Your hourly or monthly rate

- A link to 2–3 websites you built in Elementor (not templates, actual builds from a design)

- A specific WordPress or Elementor problem you solved that you are proud of



If your portfolio links are not live anymore, screenshots are fine, I just want to see your actual work.





Hours: ~20 hrs/week to start

Rate: Open to discussion based on experience

Start: As soon as the right person comes along

title: Virtual Assistant / Personal & Business / Admin & Design  (US client)
description:
We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented personal and virtual assistant to support both business and personal tasks. The work is varied — one week might include researching travel, the next might be drafting
s or scheduling social media posts. If you enjoy mixing professional and personal support work, this is a great fit.



You'll work independently, on your own schedule, as long as tasks are completed within the deadline. A task list will be posted once or twice per week. You'll have 24 or 48 hours to complete each batch, depending on complexity. No set schedule, no meetings.



Types of tasks:

Online research · Travel planning · Drafting and formatting
s · Posting content to social media platforms · Generating ideas and content using AI tools · Basic design work in Canva · Other general personal and administrative tasks



To apply, you must include all of the following:



Your resume — including the name or type of clients you've supported and the industries you've worked in.



A real troubleshooting story — Tell me about a specific time something went wrong on a task or with a client, and exactly what you did to fix it. Be specific: what broke, what you tried, what happened. Generic and AI-generated answers will not be accepted.



Screenshots of past work — Show us something you actually made or managed: a social media post, a travel itinerary, a formatted document, a Canva graphic, a content calendar — anything where we can see your work.



A design portfolio or Canva samples — Even informal work is fine. If you've made graphics, posts, presentations, or any visual content, include it. A design portfolio is strongly preferred.



One strong reason to hire you — Not a list of skills. One specific, honest reason you're the right fit for this role.



Your availability — usual working days and hours. Please list your available hours in Eastern Daylight Time zone.



What we're looking for:



Prior VA or personal assistant experience is required.

You should be comfortable switching between professional and personal tasks, handling information discreetly, and working without hand-holding.

Familiarity with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) and social media platforms is a strong plus.

Candidates who provide specific proof of relevant experience with real details and screenshots will be given priority.

Applications without work examples will not be considered.

title: Lead Software Architect / Development Agency
description:
Project: IRS-Compliant Tax Preparation & E-Filing Engine

We are seeking a highly sophisticated Software Development Team or Agency to architect and execute the development of a US-based tax filing platform. This software will be designed to compete with industry standards such as TurboTax, TaxAct, and H&R Block, prioritizing high-volume data accuracy and a seamless user experience.



This is a high-stakes, project-based engagement requiring a deep understanding of financial security, cloud architecture, and the rigorous certification protocols mandated by the Internal Revenue Service (IRS).



The Project Scope

The objective is the end-to-end creation of a robust tax preparation system. The defining challenge of this project is navigating the Modernized e-File (MeF) Assurance Testing System (ATS) to achieve full IRS production status.



Key Responsibilities:



Full-Stack Development: Build a scalable architecture using enterprise-grade frameworks (e.g., Python/Django, Java/Spring Boot, or Node.js).



IRS Certification: Lead the technical team through the vigorous process of IRS approval, ensuring all XML schemas and transmission protocols meet federal standards.



Security & Compliance: Implement bank-level encryption (AES-256), multi-factor authentication, and SOC2-compliant data handling.



Cloud Infrastructure: Deploy and manage a high-availability environment on AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud, ensuring 99.9% uptime during peak tax season.



Team Leadership: You will be responsible for providing and managing your own specialized team (QA, Backend, UI/UX, and Security Engineers).



Required Qualifications

Proven Fintech Experience: A documented history of building complex financial platforms or tax-related software.



Regulatory Knowledge: Familiarity with IRS Publication 4164 and the technical requirements for Authorized IRS e-file Providers.



Security First Mindset: Expertise in protecting sensitive PII (Personally Identifiable Information).



Management Capability: The ability to provide a "turnkey" team of individuals ready to begin development immediately.



Project Terms

Engagement: Project-Based / Milestone-Based.



Compensation: We are open to discussing a budget that reflects the complexity of the build and the expertise of your team.



Location: Remote; however, deep familiarity with US tax logic and filing regulations is mandatory.



Application Requirements

To be considered, please submit the following:



Technical Portfolio: Links to or descriptions of high-security financial systems your team has successfully deployed.



Team Composition: A breakdown of the personnel you will assign to this project (e.g., 4 Full-stack Developers, 2 QA Engineers, 1 DevOps Specialist).



Strategic Overview: A brief outline of your approach to the IRS ATS/MeF approval process.



Proposal: An initial estimate of your project rates or a range based on a project of this magnitude.

title: Property Management Leads and Application Specialist
description:
The Realty Medics handles the complex “rocket science” work of residential real estate property management - plus strategic investment property buying and selling - to deliver max value and ROI for everyday landlords and rental property investors. We help real estate investors keep their lives simple and stress-free by making sure their rental property is running on autopilot, without hiccups or glitches. And we use advanced technology that can only be designed by a former NASA engineer like our owner, Ben Sencenbaugh, to drive efficiencies and excellent customer service. In short, we deliver total Property Management Peace of Mind.



The Realty Medics offers a fast-paced, fun-loving and flexible work environment and runs on the Entrepreneurial Operating System® (EOS®). We operate and manage based on our core values and making sure people get it, want it, and have the capacity to do their jobs well. Our core values include:



• Create Wow! We provide a one-of-a-kind experience for our clients. Every time!

• Be Solutionists. We solve problems efficiently and with confidence.

• Be Pioneers. We are go-getters who strive to develop new ideas. If what we need to be our best doesn’t exist, we create it.

• Have Empathy. We understand that communication starts by listening, understanding different perspectives, and caring about others.

• Stay Ahead. We are proactive in our work and give answers before questions are asked.

• Stay Positive. We genuinely enjoy helping our clients. No problem is too big or too small to solve.

• Win Together. We work together as one team. Together we are stronger.



Job Description



We are looking for a Leads and Application Specialist to work with our team. The qualified applicant will promptly follow up with leads, build rapport with prospects, and guide them from inquiry to application. This role focuses on converting leads into applicants, delivering a strong customer experience, and accurately managing applications while keeping prospects engaged.



Since we are the fastest growing property management company in Orlando, we promote from within quickly. This is an entry level position, but we have many positions to work towards within our company.



We are a large real estate company, currently managing over 1600 single family properties.



Responsibilities



• Promptly follow up with all new leads and scheduled showings via call, text, and
 within established timeframes

• Build rapport with prospective renters and guide them through the leasing process from inquiry to application

• Use effective sales techniques to convert leads into qualified applicants

• Deliver a high-quality customer experience by answering questions, addressing concerns, and creating a sense of urgency

• Manage and process rental applications accurately and efficiently

• Maintain consistent communication with prospects to keep them engaged and moving forward



Qualifications and Skills



• Excellent communication skills (both written and verbal)

• Strong customer service mindset with a personable, approachable demeanor

• Sales-driven with the ability to confidently influence and close

• Self-motivated “go-getter” who takes initiative and follows through

• Organized and detail-oriented, especially when handling applications and follow-ups



About The Realty Medics



The Realty Medics is proud to be the leader in servicing the Central Florida real estate market. We are experts in local residential homes sales, property management (with well over 1600 properties under our management), property maintenance, property inspections and entire home rehab services. We are a turn-key solution for all of your residential real estate investments here in Central Florida. We are a full service Licensed Real Estate Brokerage Company covering the Central Florida area in Orange, Seminole, Volusia, Osceola, Lake, Brevard and Polk counties. Finding a good company to work with is extremely important. We are the top reviewed Orlando property management company for a reason, we want a long term relationship with our owners and we continue to strive to be the best in our market.

title: Virtual Executive Assistant
description:
I'm the founder of a digital growth marketing company that helps mission-driven founders scale their businesses with more ease & less overwhelm - and I'm looking for a small team of highly-skilled Executive Assistants to help take over the marketing and management tasks that make a huge difference in the lives of the people that hire us.



I'm looking for a max of 5 amazing executive assistants available for part-time (potential for full time) with a salary starting at $500 USD per month and with long term success and robust training, moving up to $700 USD per month as an emerging leader in the company.



If you have the following skill sets, I encourage you to apply:



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE:

- Minimum of 3–5 years of experience in Digital Marketing, Video Editing, Social Media Management, Content Creation, and Executive Assistant Work (Administrative Tasks, Calendar &
 Management, etc)

You’re trusted to manage marketing deliverables while providing high-level executive support, keeping priorities organized, systems moving, and leadership focused on growth instead of day-to-day execution. You've done it all from managing schedules to
 & calendar management. You have a meticulous eye for detail where Prioritization and Organization are your love language



-- 1+ years of experience in Sales Funnels and Shopify

You're a professional who is passionate about helping changemakers simplify their lives by setting up systems that will allow them to operate their businesses with more ease and less overwhelm. You have experience with sales funnel and CRM software



- 1+ years of experience advertising on platforms like Instagram,
, Tik Tok, within a Marketing team consisting of Paid Acquisition, Organic Marketing, Customer Retention, & Product Marketing

You're an emerging leader who has the potential to head a team in the future that will report directly to you. Having leadership experience is a MAJOR plus



- Creating SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)

You’ll ensure each business function has detailed documentation for repeatable and scalable growth if it isn't already place. If you see gaps, you take the initiative to fill them and produce results without anyone knowing there was an issue (yea, all that and a bag of chips :-)



- Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

- Internal certification program to enhance your professional skills in your career (I have helped clients amass at least $10M from the same digital growth marketing strategies I will require you to learn)



Interested? Please reply to this post with the secret keyword "APPLES" so I know you can pay attention to detail - from there, I'll let you know next steps if you qualify.

Besides joining a stable organization in a hot industry sector, you’ll enjoy an environment that fosters career growth, promotions, recognition, and a completive compensation and PTO package. 



Responsibilities and Duties



• Research comparable properties in the area to accurately determine a rental price

• Verify marketing material with the owner and update any property description information

• Post properties to the MLS once rental price, photos and description are confirmed

• Respond quickly to all leads and follow-up with voi
 or
 if needed. Must be comfortable communicating with investors and residents.

• Lead the application process after qualified tenants are identified

• Ensure security deposits are coordinated and received in a timely fashion

• Compose property leases and create addendums if necessary

• Manage HOA application process

• Apply all leasing fees to the tenant’s ledger  

• Coordinate utilities process by turning them off / on by the move-in date

• Ensure check-list is completed before tenant can move in (utility account numbers collected, first month’s rent paid, signed lease and HOA approval received)

• Manage tenant move-in process and introduce them to their Assistant Property Manager contact



Qualifications and Skills



• Strong written / verbal communication skills are necessary

• Accountable and takes ownership of their work

• Positive attitude and willingness to go the extra mile

• Self-motivated

• Detail-oriented

• Extremely organized

• Professional



About The Realty Medics



The Realty Medics is proud to be the leader in servicing the Central Florida real estate market. We are experts in local residential homes sales, property management (with well over 1600 properties under our management), property maintenance, property inspections and entire home rehab services. We are a turn-key solution for all of your residential real estate investments here in Central Florida. We are a full service Licensed Real Estate Brokerage Company covering the Central Florida area in Orange, Seminole, Volusia, Osceola, Lake, Brevard, Marion and Polk counties. - Experience working at a digital/online product/platform: You’re familiar with online courses, digital products & platforms and popular tools in the business space ranging from landing page builders and
 service providers to CRMs, and course hosting platforms aren’t foreign to you (We teach tools like Shopify, Convertkit, Kajabi, Teachable, Learnworlds, Calendly, etc)



ABOUT YOU:

- “You down with SOP? Yeah you know me!”—You’re an advocate for SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) to make our systems repeatable & scalable.

- Your love language is processes & predictable, meteoric growth. We never question company progress towards the quarterly and yearly goals because you keep real-time metrics for all projects.

- You’re aware of new software and can look at current systems and identify how to automate tasks a company has been doing manually for months.

- You’re addicted to digital processes & automation in the world of social media because you love building connections in the digital space and you’ve seen how powerful it can be in business growth

- You’re driven by metrics & tracking. You know that you can’t improve something unless you measure it, so you develop ways to measure performance so your company is always predictably improving.

- Timeliness and deadlines are your jam. When we have a team call at 10:00am, you show up at 9:55am. When the deadline is Tuesday at 5:30pm, you have it done Monday.

- You overcommunicate clearly and confidently. If you agree/disagree with something, you communicate that without hesitation or overthinking. You’re no stranger to asking why we do things a certain way to ensure we’re intentional with our resources.

- You’re a leader and team player. Ego? What ego? If something needs to be done, you dive in to make sure all critical tasks are accounted and cared for.



If you’re nodding your head “Yes” to the above, proceed below to apply.



PERKS:

I'm committed to setting our staff up for success with access to trainings that will certify your skills in:

- Task & Calendar Management

- Launch/Sales Strategy Planning

- Sales Funnel Tech Setup (For E-Commerce or Service Based Businesses)

- Social Media Management

- Digital Media Marketing (Including
 and SMS Marketing)

- Lead Generation



After one week of training and assessment, you're officially certified under our internal training program, which means hitting the ground running with your new skills. Perks include:

- Part time work hours

- Work from anywhere in the world (as long as your internet signal is strong and computer is fast)

- Starting Salary at $500 USD a month ($6000 USD annual)

title: Outbound Business Development ( Partnership Acquisition Specialist)
Sales Closer/Sales Representative
description:
Remote High-Ticket Sales Closer (Wellness / Healthcare)

Compensation:

$8.00/hour base + uncapped high-ticket commissions

On-Target Earnings (OTE): $4,000–$7,000+ per month

Job Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Schedule: U.S. Eastern Time hours required

________________________________________

Who This Role Is For

This role is exclusively for proven high-ticket closers. If you consistently close premium offers through phone or video consultations and thrive in a performance-driven environment, this opportunity is built for you.

Tesla BioHealing is scaling rapidly with strong inbound demand in the bioenergy wellness space. We are seeking disciplined, ethical closers who can confidently guide clients through high-value purchasing decisions while delivering a white-glove, consultative experience.

________________________________________

What You’ll Be Closing

• High-ticket wellness and therapeutic solutions

• Deal sizes typically $1,000–$5,000+

• Qualified inbound leads + strategic outbound opportunities

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

• Close high-ticket inbound and outbound sales calls

• Lead structured virtual consultations (phone & video)

• Diagnose client needs and present tailored solutions

• Handle objections confidently and close decisively

• Consistently hit or exceed weekly and monthly revenue targets

• Maintain accurate CRM records and pipeline visibility

• Deliver a premium, trust-based buying experience

________________________________________

Required Qualifications (Non-Negotiable)

• 5+ years of phone or virtual sales experience

• Documented success closing high-ticket offers ($1K+)

• Availability to work U.S. Eastern Time hours

• Strong objection-handling, persuasion, and closing skills

• High emotional intelligence and consultative sales approach

• Self-managed, disciplined, and results-oriented

• Comfortable in a metrics-driven sales culture

________________________________________

Strongly Preferred

• Healthcare, wellness, or medical-adjacent sales experience

• Inbound high-intent lead environment background

• Proficiency with CRM tools and remote sales systems

•Social Media Influencer sourcing and management + Sales closing experience +
 platform management as a plus

•Doctor’s office or any medical related office lead generation, scheduling, and service sales closing

•Web designer – Shopify webpage experienced

•Hotel / Hospitality Event Sales – Lead generation, nurturing, appointment setting, closing, upselling – experience required

________________________________________

What We Offer

• Hourly base + uncapped commissions

• Realistic $4K–$7K+ monthly OTE

• Fully remote work environment

• Qualified leads and strong market demand

• Product, sales, and ongoing performance training

• Long-term growth and leadership opportunities

________________________________________

How to Apply

This is a selective role.

Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A 2-minute video introduction covering:

o Your high-ticket closing experience

o Average deal size closed

o Monthly revenue you’ve historically produced

o Why you’re a strong fit for Tesla BioHealing

3. Your LinkedIn profile

Record your video introduction as to why you're a right fit and
 both to:

title: Medical Scribe / Executive Assistant
description:
We are seeking a highly organized and experienced Virtual Assistant with a background in nursing and executive support. This unique role blends clinical knowledge with executive administrative skills to support both healthcare-related tasks and business operations.

Provide administrative support to executives, including calendar management, scheduling, and meeting coordination.

Manage
s, handle correspondence, and communicate with internal and external stakeholders.

Skills:

Familiarity with healthcare processes and medical terminology.

Work from the comfort of your home.

Opportunity to use both your healthcare and sales expertise.

Supportive and collaborative work environment.

Competitive salary



Technical:

Computer/laptop

Webcam

Backup power (not required)

 and more)

Designing high-quality graphics for posts and campaigns

Supporting campaign launches and ongoing content series

Engaging with audiences (comments, messages, conversations) during UK working hours

Monitoring performance and improving results over time



A strong social media manager is responsible for strategy, content, engagement and performance, not just posting



What we’re looking for



This is important. Please only apply if you meet these.



Proven experience working with UK clients

Strong track record of delivering successful social media campaigns

Excellent written English and copywriting skills

Ability to write captions that feel natural, human and on-brand

Key skills required

Content strategy & planning

Graphic design for social media

Analytics and performance tracking

Community management and engagement

Understanding platform algorithms and trends

Audience targeting and content positioning

SEO and social search awareness

Competitor and trend analysis



Modern social media roles require a mix of creative, strategic and data-driven skills, including analytics, audience insight and campaign planning



Platforms & tools



Experience in some of these is expected:



Instagram, LinkedIn,
, TikTok

Scheduling tools (Later, Buffer, Hootsuite, Meta Suite etc.)

Canva or similar design tools

Analytics tools (native platforms or third-party tools)



Bonus:



Video editing (Reels / TikTok / short-form content)

Experience with paid ads

Experience working within an agency

Working hours

Starting at 8 hours per week

Some availability during UK working hours required for engagement

Flexible outside of this

Strong potential to increase hours as we grow



Pay 

Starting at £6 per hour which will be reviewed over time. 



Screening Questions:

 1. Tell us about your experience managing social media accounts. What types of businesses or industries have you worked with?

, then share the link with us.



To Apply, please submit the following:

title: AI Image Prompt Specialist - Realistic Human Fashion (Simulated Clothing Shoots)
description:
We’re looking for a highly detail-oriented AI Image Prompt Specialist to generate realistic human fashion images for simulated clothing shoots (e-commerce style). Your job is to consistently produce outputs that look like real photos that are not “AI-looking” and to refine prompts until results meet our realism and brand standards.



You’ll be trained on our realism rules (how to avoid common AI artifacts and unrealistic outputs). But you must already be excellent at prompt writing, iterative refinement, and visual QA.



What You’ll Do



- Generate realistic human model images for clothing/product presentations (studio + lifestyle concepts)

- Write and refine prompts to:



- Keep humans anatomically correct (hands, faces, body proportions, posture)

- Ensure realistic fabric behavior (drape, folds, seams, tension points, thickness)

- Maintain clean product visibility (logos, prints, stitching, garment shape)

- Match lighting, camera lens feel, and consistent “photoshoot” aesthetics

- Run multiple iterations quickly, compare outputs, and select the best

- Apply consistent standards for realism and brand look

- Track prompt versions and what changed (so we can improve repeatability)

- Follow internal guidelines to reduce AI artifacts and “uncanny” results



Requirements (Must-Have)



- Proven experience generating photorealistic AI images of humans

- Strong prompt engineering skills: composition, lighting, camera settings, styling, negative prompts, refinement loops

- Sharp eye for detail and realism (you notice small issues quickly)

- Able to match a reference style and keep outputs consistent

- Excellent English comprehension for instructions and feedback

- Reliable communication + ability to deliver daily/weekly output targets



Nice-to-Have



- Fashion/e-commerce/photography background (styling, lighting, posing, editorial vs product shooting)

- Experience with consistent character/model workflows

- Experience building “prompt recipes” / reusable prompt frameworks

- Basic understanding of garment construction (seams, collars, cuffs, hems)



How We’ll Work



We’ll provide:

- Clothing references / creative direction

- Our realism checklist + training on what to avoid

- Feedback loops to improve consistency



You deliver:

- A set of usable images per product/concept

- The prompts used + notes on what you changed between iterations



To Apply Please include:

1. Your portfolio/examples (especially realistic humans + fashion)

2. The AI tools/workflows you use (and why)

3. A short note: your process for fixing common realism issues (hands, faces, fabric, lighting)

4. Your availability + expected hourly rate



If you’re the kind of person who can make AI images look like they came from a real camera and you’re obsessive about realism we want to work with you.

title: AI Image + Video Generator (Training Provided | Long-Term | Part-Time/Full-Time)
description:
We’re hiring an AI Image and Video Generator to help us create high-quality visuals using AI tools (image generation + short-form video generation). You’ll work from prompts, references, and brand guidelines to produce content that looks clean, consistent, and ready for posting/ads/product pages.

Pay & Growth

title: VoIP B2B Support
description:
The Role:



We're looking for an experienced, technically sharp VoIP support agent to join our team remotely. You'll be the go-to person for troubleshooting, provisioning, and keeping our customers' phone systems running smoothly.

What You'll Do



Troubleshoot call quality issues (jitter, latency, packet loss), registration failures, and onetway/no-audio scenarios

Provision and configure SIP endpoints, desk phones, softphones, and ATAs

Manage PBX configurations including call routing, auto attendants, ring groups, and IVRs

Handle number porting, CNAM/caller ID issues, and carrier-level escalations

Work with customers directly to diagnose network and firewall-related VoIP problems

Document issues and resolutions in our ticketing system



What We're Looking For:



3+ years of hands-on VoIP/UCaaS support experience (not optional)

Strong understanding of SIP, RTP, ocodecs, oand oVoIP oprotocols

Experience with hosted PBX platforms (familiarity with obroadsoft-based oplatforms oa oplus)

Comfortable reading SIP traces, packet captures, and call oflow odiagrams

Working knowledge of networking fundamentals: DNS, DHCP, NAT, firewalls, VLANs, QoS

Familiarity with carrier/wholesale voice operations and number porting processes

Self-motivated — you can work independently without constant oversight



Nice to Have:

title: IT Help Desk Specialist
description:
Help Desk Support Specialist (Remote, Full-Time)



We’re looking for a skilled Help Desk Support Specialist who can own technical issues from diagnosis to resolution across cloud platforms, networks, and devices. This role goes beyond basic ticket handling — you’ll be a key problem-solver for our team, working in a fast-paced environment where accuracy, curiosity, and initiative matter.



Who We Are

We’re a lean, tech-focused team that operates with speed and minimal bureaucracy. We value clear communication, shared ownership, and continual improvement.



Our Culture



Built for Problem-Solvers

We value people who dig into issues, trace problems to their root cause, and enjoy understanding systems at a deeper level.



Remote-First and Trust-Based

We prioritize outcomes over hours. You’ll have autonomy, flexibility, and the space to work independently.



Collaborative and Practical

We work together without ego or unnecessary process. Everyone contributes, and no one hides behind rigid roles.



Improvement Mindset

We’re always refining how we work — tools, processes, documentation. If something can be better, we expect you to help make it better.



Technical First

We treat support as a technical discipline. Curiosity, experimentation, and thoughtful troubleshooting are part of the job.



Human-Focused Support

We pair solid technical work with clear, patient communication and respect for the people we help.



How to Apply (Please Read Carefully)

To be considered, you must submit the following through the job platform’s messaging system:

•  A link to a short introductory video explaining why you're a strong candidate

•  Your resume

•  Your profile link on this job platform

Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Key Responsibilities

•  Provide expert-level support via phone, chat, and

•  Diagnose and resolve complex hardware, software, and network issues

•  Support and troubleshoot Microsoft 365, including:

•  Outlook (profiles, mail flow, advanced configuration)

•  Teams (permissions, meetings, call quality, device integration)

•  SharePoint (permissions, file sync, site access)

•  Manage user accounts, authentication, and permissions

•  Maintain detailed documentation and update support tickets

•  Collaborate on internal IT projects and system improvements

•  Meet and exceed performance metrics such as response time, resolution rate, and customer satisfaction



Required Qualifications

•  5+ years of hands-on technical support experience

•  Strong troubleshooting skills across hardware, software, networking, and cloud platforms

•  Advanced proficiency with Microsoft 365, including Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, and admin functions

•  Experience with remote desktop tools and enterprise ticketing systems

•  Strong understanding of Windows, macOS, and mobile OS environments

•  Solid grasp of networking fundamentals (DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls, Wi?Fi)

•  Knowledge of cybersecurity best practices

•  Experience supporting VOIP phone systems

•  Working knowledge of office printers

•  Excellent English communication skills

•  Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple priorities



Preferred technical experience:

•  Unifi

•  Microsoft 365 administration 
, apps, SharePoint, Teams policies)



Work-From-Home Requirements

•  Quiet, dedicated workspace

•  Reliable computer with up-to-date hardware and dual monitors

•  High-speed internet (50 Mbps minimum recommended)

•  Noise-canceling headset, microphone, and smartphone connected to WiFi

•  Webcam for meetings and ticket reviews

•  Familiarity with VPNs and secure authentication methods



Bonus Points

•  Certifications such as CompTIA A+, Network+, Security+, or Microsoft

•  Experience supporting cloud platforms (Microsoft 365, Google Workspace)

•  Multilingual support

•  Ability to work flexible shifts or participate in on-call rotations



Ready to Apply?

If you’re a technically strong IT professional who thrives in a fast-moving, startup-style environment, submit your application with all required materials listed above. We can’t wait to meet you.

title: Underwriter (Real Estate)
description:
Join Easydwell: Contribute to Innovative Homeownership Solutions



Easydwell is a rapidly expanding real estate fund dedicated to redefining access to and management of homeownership. We seek a meticulous and analytical Underwriter who excels in critical thinking, precision, and sound decision-making.



Ideal candidates possess a strong aptitude for quantitative analysis, challenge assumptions, and demonstrate a commitment to uncovering insights through comprehensive data review. If you have a disciplined underwriting approach and aspire to take ownership in a dynamic, high-growth setting, this role may be well-suited for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

You will be responsible for safeguarding portfolio integrity by conducting risk evaluations with accuracy, consistency, and sound judgment.

- Property Valuation & Market Analysis

Perform and interpret comparative market analyses (comps) to determine realistic property values and identify market trends.

- Risk Assessment

Review applicant financials, credit reports, and property-level data to evaluate overall risk exposure.

- Underwriting Decisions

Deliver informed recommendations to approve, decline, or counter applications in accordance with Easydwell’s established underwriting standards.

- Documentation Review & Verification

Cross-check all submitted documents to ensure accuracy, consistency, and compliance, identifying red flags or discrepancies when present.

- Clear Internal Communication

Prepare concise, professionally written reports detailing underwriting decisions and rationale for internal stakeholders.



What We’re Looking For

This position is ideal for analytical professionals who prioritize precision, accountability, and uphold high standards.

- Strong Numerical & Analytical Skills

Exceptional comfort working with financial data, identifying patterns, and drawing defensible conclusions.

- Advanced Excel Proficiency

Confident using formulas, structured models, and data organization to support underwriting decisions.

- Real Estate Valuation Experience (Preferred)

Prior experience running comps and evaluating property values in real estate or related markets is strongly preferred.

- Relevant Background

Experience in underwriting—within real estate, mortgage, or financial services—is preferred. Candidates with robust finance or analytical backgrounds and demonstrated learning agility will also be considered.

- Excellent English Communication

Clear, professional written and verbal communication is essential, including strong pronunciation for effective collaboration with global teams.

title: Copy Director

, SMS, funnel, and website marketing ecosystem.

The ideal candidate is both creative and analytical — someone who understands how to craft compelling messaging and optimize it across funnels, campaigns, and web experiences.

Own and oversee all copy across
, SMS, funnels, and website pages

Guide and develop junior copywriters on tone, structure, and execution

Set clear standards for what “high-performing” copy looks like





Quality Control

Performance & Optimization

Identify winning messaging patterns and scale them

Continuously test, iterate, and optimize copy across
, SMS, and web pages

Use data to inform creative and strategic decisions





Client & Partner Management

Collaborate on campaign, funnel, and offer strategy

Ensure all deliverables align with partner goals and expectations





Campaign & Funnel Execution



Work closely with junior copywriters to produce high-quality campaigns and funnel assets

Oversee copy for landing pages, sales pages, and key website touchpoints

Support launches for promotions, events, and marketing initiatives

Ensure all copy is delivered accurately and on time





Requirements



Proven experience in copywriting and managing copy teams, preferably in digital marketing

Strong expertise in
, SMS, funnel, and website copywriting

Track record of writing or directing copy that drives measurable results (revenue, conversions)

Experience mentoring or managing junior tea
mbers

Nice to Have

title: Senior SEO Copywriter - Remote
description:

Strategic Content Creation: Write high-quality, conversion-focused content, including long-form blogs, service pages, white papers, and landing pages that adhere to SEO best practices.



Keyword & Topic Research: Utilize advanced SEO tools (SEMrush, Ahrefs, etc) to identify search trends, user intent, and high-value keywords to drive, not just traffic, but qualified leads.

Experience: 5+ years of professional copywriting experience, ideally with digital marketing agency experience.

Exceptional Writing Ability: Flawless English communication skills with the ability to write in various tones and styles tailored to different demographics.

title: Copywriter & Video Quality Checker
description:
We are seeking a detail-oriented and highly skilled Copywriter & Video Quality Checker to ensure accuracy, clarity, and professionalism across all short-form video content we produce. This role is essential in maintaining high quality standards and eliminating errors before deliverables reach our clients. The ideal candidate has exceptional English writing skills, strong familiarity with U.S. culture, and experience reviewing and correcting content for grammar, spelling, and brand accuracy. This full-time position requires availability during EST business hours.



Key Responsibilities:



Caption & Copy Review

-Review captions and on-screen text for proper grammar, spelling, punctuation, and formatting

-Correct any errors in sentence flow, readability, and clarity

-Ensure tone and messaging align with each client’s brand voice

-Maintain consistency in writing style across client content



Video Quality Checking

-Monitor videos for errors such as incorrect names, brand references, and terminology

-Identify and flag issues with subtitles, pacing of captions, and readability

-Confirm accuracy of quotes and statements when needed

-Work closely with Content Uploaders and Editors to implement corrections efficientl



Content Consistency & Brand Accuracy

-Verify client-specific style guidelines are followed across all delivered assets

-Check for continuity and alignment in messaging within content series

-Ensure correct spelling of client names, product names, and company details

-Maintain and update reference sheets for recurring clients when necessary



Team Communication & Workflow Collaboration

-Provide clear, actionable feedback to editing and creative teams

-Coordinate revisions and track video updates through internal systems

-Support Content Managers in quality-assurance checkpoints before client review

-Communicate proactively to resolve discrepancies or missing information



Qualifications & Skills



Required:

-2+ years of professional copywriting, content editing, or proofreading experience

-Extremely strong English language skills, including grammar, spelling, and punctuation

-Strong attention to detail and quality control mindset

-Experience working with digital or social media content

-Ability to manage multiple deadlines in a fast-paced environment

-Professional communication skills and ability to collaborate with remote teams

-Availability full-time (40 hrs/week) during EST business hours



Preferred:

-Understanding of U.S. cultural context, references, and common language usage

-Experience with captioning workflows, content approval, or creative QA

-Familiarity with short-form platforms such as TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

-Basic knowledge of project management tools (Notion, Slack, ClickUp, 
, etc.)

title: Creative Strategist (TikTok & Instagram)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a Creative Strategist who specializes in identifying and analyzing viral creatives on TikTok and Instagram worldwide.



Your main responsibility is to source high-performing content and translate insights into  actionable strategies for our team.

You will work closely with our Social Media Manager and Affiliate Manager, providing weekly reports and creative direction that help us go viral and scale content performance.



Your Responsibilities

Source and identify top-performing viral creatives (UGC & ads) globally on: TikTok & Instagram



Focus specifically on:

- Hair styling tools niche (must-have experience)

- Viral ad creatives from brands

- Organic UGC content that performs exceptionally well



Deliver a weekly weekend report, including:

- Best performing creatives (with links/examples)

- Key patterns and trends

- Why these creatives perform (hooks, angles, formats)

- Recommendations for replication



Provide strategic insights, including:

- How to adapt creatives to our brand

- Improvements based on awareness stages & target persona

- Ideas for new viral concepts



Advise on:

- What we are currently doing wrong (if applicable)

- How to improve creative performance

- Opportunities to go viral



Work independently and take full ownership of your role



What You Are NOT Responsible For

> Contacting creators

> Managing partnerships

> Outreach



???? Your role is purely focused on sourcing, analysis, and strategy



Our Goals

1. Get as many videos as possible into the algorithm

2. Consistently create viral-performing content

3. Scale winning creative angles globally



Requirements

The ideal candidate:

1. Has proven experience in finding viral content on TikTok & Instagram

2. Has experience within the hair styling tools niche (required)

3. Understands UGC, paid ads, and viral content mechanics

4. Can translate insights into clear, actionable strategies

5. Strong understanding of:

Hooks & retention

Creative angles

Awareness stages & personas

6. Is highly communicative and structured

7. Works independently and takes ownership

8. Uses tools/platforms to identify trending & viral content

9. Shows initiative and thinks proactively

10. Is motivated for a long-term collaboration



Exclusivity Requirement (non-negotiable)

> You are not currently working with, or planning to work with, competing e-commerce brands within the hair styling tools niche

> Full discretion and confidentiality are expected



Compensation

- Fixed hourly rate and minimum weekly hour planning

- Performance-based pay increases

- Bonuses for exceptional results

- Long-term collaboration opportunity



What We Offer

Full flexibility — work when it suits you (weekend reporting required), we care

about the reults.

No micromanagement — we focus on results

Freedom and ownership in your role

Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling team

Direct impact on brand growth and viral success

> Your availability

title: Video Editor (language education content)
description:
I am an English Pronunciation and American Accent Coach looking for a detail-oriented Video Editor to produce educational content, both short- and long-form. You will primarily be turning "talking head" footage into high-retention social media content, such as short form instagram content or long form video podcasts for YouTube.



Most of my content consists of "talking head" videos where I discuss linguistics, pronunciation, and the mindset behind language learning.



Core Responsibilities:



- Video editing: cutting out bloopers, minimal zooms to emphasize key points, and other typical social media cuts for audience retention.

- Audio: occasional sound effects to emphasize key points, audio cleanup if necessary

- Educational Overlays: Correcting auto-captions, placing diagrams or phonetic transcriptions and other text (I will provide this).



Requirements:



- English proficiency: I teach English pronunciation, so you need to be decent in English, especially since a lot of content revolves around foreign-accented English, your English needs to be good enough to understand other accents

- Communication with me: as it is likely I may need to correct overlaid text or diagrams, so we will need to be in contact a few times a week.

- File management: There will likely be a lot of files we are sharing, so make sure you name the files correctly and place them in the right folders.



How to apply:

Please link your portfolio of video editing work. Also start your message with “phonetics” so I know you’ve read this. If you have any experience with language teaching or the English language, please let me know about that too.





PLEASE NOTE:

I am a small one person company. I cannot afford to pay too much! I'm only looking for a PART-TIME video editor, a couple of videos a week max.

title: AI Fashion Creative (Visual Stylist)
description:
We are a U.S.-based performance marketing agency behind some of the most iconic names in American fashion. We're talking brands with decades of cultural weight, names that have been on runways, on celebrities, and in streetwear history books. We're hiring a full-time AI Creative who will own the visual output for multiple fashion clients, producing lifestyle imagery and product-on-model visuals using AI generation tools.



This is not a graphic design role. We are not looking for someone who makes templates or edits photos. We are looking for someone with a genuine eye for fashion, someone who understands how a brand should FEEL, can study raw inputs and references, and translate them into polished, on-brand AI-generated visuals without constant direction.



What You'll Do:

- Receive raw product images, brand references, or brief direction and produce finished lifestyle and product-on-model visuals

- Generate 20–30+ on-brand visuals per week across multiple fashion clients, each with a distinct aesthetic

- Own the full generation workflow - prompting, refining, quality-checking - from input to final asset

- Work independently with minimal back-and-forth; you're expected to make creative decisions



Tools You Can Use:

- Higgsfield

- Midjourney

- Freepik AI

- Nano Banna Pro

- Any other AI generation tools you're strong in



Who We're Looking For:

- You have a strong fashion eye. You follow fashion brands, editorials, or creators — not because it's your job, but because you're into it

- You've used AI generation tools seriously, not casually. You know how to get a specific result, not just a good-looking one

- You can work across different brand aesthetics. Streetwear, vintage Americana, luxury — you can switch modes

- You are self-directed. You don't need someone to hold your hand on every output

- You take creative ownership. If something looks off-brand, you fix it before sending it



To Apply:

Include the following or your application will not be reviewed:



1) A portfolio or folder of AI-generated visuals you've made

(Optional but strongly preferred: examples specific to fashion or apparel)

2) List the AI tools you use most and briefly describe what you've used each one for

3) What is your expected monthly rate (in USD)?

4) Pick any fashion brand, one you know well, and in 4–6 sentences describe what makes their visual world distinct. Think: mood, color, who's in the imagery, where it's set, how it feels. Then tell us how you would recreate that feel using AI tools.

Requirements

title: Skilled Video Editor
description:
We're building a YouTube channel from the ground up and looking for someone to grow with it.



The channel covers geopolitics, business, history and technology — content that actually makes people think. The kind of videos that respect the audience's intelligence. This is not a faceless automation project. It's a real brand with a clear identity, a defined aesthetic, and a long runway if we do this right.



Some background on us: there's real success behind this team in affiliate marketing through YouTube, so we understand how retention works, what makes people click and what the metrics actually mean. We know what good looks like and we need someone who can execute it and eventually help push it further.



Right now the workload is part-time, roughly 10 to 20 hours per week. As the channel grows, so does the role. The goal is to build something with one or two talented people over time rather than burn through editors every few months.



On the technical side, solid video editing, photo editing and motion graphics are a must. If you can make something feel cinematic and purposeful rather than templated and generic, we'll get along well.



Shortlisted applicants will be asked to complete a short test assignment, around one minute of edited footage. You'll be briefed fully on the style and direction before starting. There's no payment for the test, but the brief will be clear and your time won't be wasted with vague feedback.



If you take craft seriously, want to be part of building something instead of just clocking hours, and are looking for a working relationship that actually goes somewhere, throw your hat in the ring.

title: GoHighLevel Developer & CRM Automation Specialist (Dental Marketing)
description:
DEVELOPER A — GHL / CRM / PATIENT SYSTEMS TRACK



Webster Dental Group operates 3 dental practices in British Columbia, Canada (Kelowna Dental Centre, Brightside Dental, and New Teeth Today — a full-arch implant brand, ~$60K average case). We have a complete, production-ready Marketing OS — a 400+ page master playbook covering every system, workflow, API integration, automation, and campaign we need built. The strategy is done. We need someone to execute it. Fast.



SPEED IS EVERYTHING. We are exiting 3 current vendors on a fixed timeline. Every week of delay costs us money. The right person ships daily, not weekly.



=== YOUR ROLE ===



You own everything patient-facing. GoHighLevel is the command centre for all 3 practices. You will build the entire CRM automation layer — 30 workflows across 3 locations, AI Employee deployment (Voice AI, Conversation AI, Review AI), the patient conversion pipeline, membership plans, surveys, and the master snapshot that lets us onboard new practices in days instead of months.



Every step is documented in the playbook with exact configurations, copy-paste code, and completion checklists. You follow the playbook, build it, test it, check it off.



=== YOUR 12-WEEK SCOPE (~280 hours) ===



Weeks 1-2 (Shared Sprint): GHL multi-location setup (3 sub-accounts), HIPAA activation, PMS integration for appointment sync, CallRail setup with DNI, asset audit + platform ownership transfers.



Weeks 3-5 (Phase 1 Core): Build all 10 GHL automation workflows per practice (30 total): missed call text-back, appointment reminders, review requests, new lead nurture, reactivation, no-show follow-up, insurance expiry, birthday, recall, referral tracking.



Weeks 4-6 (Claude API): Claude API integration + 3 brand-specific system prompts (KDC, Brightside, NTT). New practice onboarding master prompt. Test all AI-generated content pipelines.



Weeks 6-8 (AI Employee): GHL Agency Pro upgrade. Deploy AI Employee: Voice AI (call handling script), Conversation AI (80 Q&A pairs per practice), Review AI (15 response templates). Test with live traffic.



Weeks 7-9 (Patient Systems): Before/after photo system for cosmetic cases. Patient satisfaction surveys + NPS tracking. Membership plan workflow for uninsured patients. Referral tracking automation.



Weeks 9-11 (NTT Track): NTT GHL audit + upgrade. 12-month post-consultation email nurture (12 templates for $60K implant cases). NTT landing page. Yaletown Dentistry GBP integration. WhatsApp channel.



Weeks 11-12 (Snapshot + QA): Master Snapshot v1 for new practice onboarding. Full QA across all 3 locations. Documentation + handoff. Year 2 maintenance plan.



=== MUST-HAVE SKILLS ===



- GoHighLevel expert — multi-location setups, complex workflows, triggers, automations (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- GHL API experience — webhooks, contact/opportunity management via API

- GHL AI Employee setup — Voice AI, Conversation AI, Review AI

- Claude API or LLM integration — connecting AI to generate content/responses within workflows

- CallRail or similar call tracking — DNI setup, call routing, conversion tracking

- CRM automation design — triggers, conditions, timing delays, conversion funnels

- SMS/email marketing automation — nurture sequences, drip campaigns

- Self-directed execution — the playbook has every step; you follow it and ship daily

- Excellent written English

- Available for 4+ hours overlap with Pacific Time (PST/PDT) daily



=== NICE-TO-HAVE ===



- Healthcare or dental marketing experience

- HIPAA awareness / health data handling

- Canadian market experience (PIPEDA, CASL)

- GHL Snapshot creation and management

- Landing page design/build within GHL

- WhatsApp Business API integration



=== HOURS & PAY ===



- 40 hours/week is the ABSOLUTE MINIMUM. This is a full-time commitment.

- You may work as many hours per week as you want at your straight hourly rate — NO CAP. If you want to put in 50, 60, or 70 hours/week to finish faster, we pay every hour at the same rate.

- We reward speed. Your extra hours directly save us vendor costs.

- Rate: Competitive, based on experience. Include your hourly rate (USD) in your application.

- Payment: Bi-weekly, negotiable.



=== BONUS STRUCTURE ===



Speed Bonus — Finish your track ahead of the 12-week target and earn a completion bonus. The earlier you finish (with all checklist items passing QA), the larger the bonus. We will agree on specific bonus tiers before you start.



Excellence Bonus — Deliver exceptional work (clean, well-documented, thoroughly tested, performing above expectations) and earn an additional quality bonus at project completion. Assessed on: checklist completion, system reliability post-launch, documentation quality, and measurable performance improvements.



Both bonuses stack. Finish early AND deliver exceptional work = both payouts.



=== WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT ===



- Complete 400+ page playbook provided — exact GHL configs, workflow logic, copy-paste prompts, test procedures

- Clear scope — you own GHL/CRM exclusively (Developer B handles ads/SEO separately)

- Completion checklists for every phase

- Weekly automated check-in — Friday SMS with your exact milestone

- Direct access to the owner (Dr. Webster) — fast decisions, no bureaucracy

- Growth potential — ongoing maintenance + new practice rollouts



=== HOW TO APPLY ===



1. Brief introduction — who you are and relevant experience

2. Your GoHighLevel experience (specific: multi-location setups? how many workflows built? API integrations?)

3. Screenshots or walkthrough of a GHL build you're proud of

4. Any experience with AI Employee (Voice AI, Conversation AI, Review AI)

5. Your Claude API or LLM integration experience (if any)

6. Your hourly rate (USD) and availability to start

7. BONUS: 2-3 minute Loom video walking through a GHL project you built



The playbook is written. Every workflow is specified. We need the GHL expert who can build it. Apply today — the right person starts next week.

title: Funnel Builder VA — Ecommerce
description:
We're a ecommerce brand. We build and test funnels fast — advertorials, listicles, landing pages, product pages — and we need a detail-oriented VA to execute builds reliably so our strategists can stay focused on creative and scaling.



This is a systems-driven role. You'll follow clear SOPs to build and launch funnels. If you love clean execution, organized workflows, and seeing things go from copy doc to live page — this is for you.







**What You'll Be Doing**



- Building advertorials, listicles, and landing pages  (primarily on Funnelish / Shopify)

- Setting up product pages, order bumps, and upsell flows based on templates and SOPs

- Managing funnel versioning and tracking in our Notion/Google Sheets system

- Uploading and formatting creatives (images, GIFs) into landing pages

- Setting up A/B split tests on advertorial ATFs (headline + hero image + lead combos)



---



**What You Need to Have**



- Experience building pages in Funnelish, Checkout Champ, Shopify, or similar funnel builders

- Strong attention to detail — you catch spacing issues, broken links, and mobile formatting before anyone else does

- Ability to follow SOPs precisely without needing hand-holding

- Comfortable working asynchronously and hitting deadlines without reminders

- Basic understanding of direct response funnel structure (advertorial ? product page ? upsell) — you don't need to write copy, but you need to understand what you're building and why



---



**Nice to Have**



- Experience with DR health/supplement/gadget brands

- Basic image editing (Canva or Figma) to format hero images for advertorials



---



**How We Work**



- Full-time remote

- Clear SOPs for every build type — you won't be guessing

- Tight feedback loops — every build gets reviewed before going live

- Fast-moving environment: we test new funnel variants weekly, sometimes daily



---



**How to Apply**



Record a short Loom (under 3 minutes) showing us a funnel or landing page you've built. Walk us through the build, what tools you used. A. Then answer these two questions in writing:

2. You receive a document for a new advertorial but one section is unclear. What do you do before you start building?



Applications without a Loom will not be reviewed.

title: Marketing Automation Engineer & Ads/SEO Specialist (Dental)
description:
DEVELOPER B — INTELLIGENCE / ADS / SEO TRACK
Marketing Automation Engineer & Ads/SEO Specialist
Contract | Full-Time Remote | Immediate Start | ~224 hours / 12 weeks

== ROLE AT A GLANCE ==
You own the intelligence layer and all paid/organic acquisition. You will build 8 n8n automation workflows (competitive intelligence, content pipeline, AI lead scoring, market research, performance reporting, ad spend optimization), rebuild Google Ads + Meta Ads + Bing Ads across 3 dental practices in practice-owned accounts, implement full technical SEO + AEO/GEO strategy, and build the Looker Studio executive dashboard. Every step is documented in a 400+ page Marketing OS playbook with exact API endpoints, node configurations, and checklists.

== THE PROJECT ==
Webster Dental Group operates 3 dental practices in British Columbia, Canada (Kelowna Dental Centre, Brightside Dental, and New Teeth Today — a full-arch implant brand, ~$60K average case). We have a complete, production-ready Marketing OS — a 400+ page master playbook covering every system, workflow, API integration, automation, and campaign we need built. The strategy is done. We need a builder who can execute it at speed. We are exiting 3 current vendors (ad agency, SEO provider, lead gen service) on a fixed timeline, so every week of delay costs real money.

== YOUR 12-WEEK SCOPE ==

--- 8 n8n Intelligence Workflows ---
WF1: Competitive Intelligence Monitor — automated tracking of competitor websites, ads, reviews, GBP posts. Weekly briefing.
WF2: Automated Content Pipeline — Claude generates blog posts (600-1000 words), GBP posts (150 words x4), social captions, email newsletter. Staged in GHL Social Planner.
WF3: AI Lead Scoring — real-time scoring of new leads using Claude analysis of form data, call transcripts, and behavioral signals. Scores push to GHL.
WF4: Market Research — automated analysis of local dental market trends, new competitor detection, pricing intelligence.
WF5: Performance Reporting — automated weekly report aggregating all channels into a single Google Sheet + email summary.
WF6: AI Ad Spend Optimization — automated budget recommendations across Google/Meta/Bing using platform metrics, GHL lead scores, CallRail data, treatment LTV mix, and Kelowna seasonality.
WF7: Ad Creative A/B Rotation — automated rotation and performance tracking of ad variants.
WF8: NPS Trending & Alerting — track patient satisfaction scores, alert on negative trends.

--- Paid Advertising (3 Practices + NTT) ---
Google Ads: Full campaign rebuild in practice-owned MCC. Search, display, remarketing. Conversion tracking with offline import from GHL.
Meta Ads: Campaign rebuild + Conversions API (CAPI) for server-side tracking. Custom audiences, lookalikes, retargeting.
Bing Ads: Import from Google Ads, adapt for Microsoft Advertising.
NTT: 5 specialized campaigns targeting full-arch implant keywords ($60K case value). YouTube Ads for video content.
Landing Pages: Service-specific landing pages for all major campaigns across all practices.

--- SEO + AEO + GEO ---
Technical SEO: Core Web Vitals, robots.txt, XML sitemaps, canonical tags, redirect hygiene, site architecture, internal linking, image optimization, mobile-first compliance.
Schema Markup: LocalBusiness, Dentist, MedicalOrganization, FAQ, Review schemas for rich results.
AEO (Answer Engine Optimization): FAQ content optimized for featured snippets, answer-first page structure, structured data for Google AI Overviews.
GEO (Generative Engine Optimization): Semantic SEO, credibility signals, E-E-A-T optimization so practices get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini.
NTT City Strategy: Programmatic SEO pages for full-arch implants across Western Canada cities.

--- Looker Studio Executive Dashboard ---
9 data sources: Google Ads, Meta Ads, Bing Ads, GA4, GSC, CallRail, GHL, Semrush, Google Sheets (n8n output)
6 pages: Overview, Google Ads, Meta Ads, SEO, Calls/Leads, NTT
All 3 practices filterable by location. Auto-refresh. UTM attribution framework.

== MUST-HAVE SKILLS ==
• n8n or Make.com expert — complex multi-step workflows with API nodes, conditional logic, error handling
• Google Ads proficiency — full campaign builds, conversion tracking, offline conversion import, MCC experience
• Meta Ads proficiency — campaign builds, custom audiences, Conversions API (CAPI) server-side tracking
• SEO knowledge — technical SEO (Core Web Vitals, schema markup, site architecture), on-page optimization, GSC/GA4
• Claude API or LLM integration — using AI APIs within automation workflows
• Google Looker Studio — multi-source dashboards with blended data, calculated fields, filters
• API integration skills — REST APIs, webhooks, OAuth. You will connect 10+ platforms.
• JavaScript or Python — for n8n function nodes, data transformation, API scripting
• Google Analytics 4 + Google Tag Manager — event tracking, conversion setup, GTM container management
• Self-directed execution — the playbook documents every node configuration and API call; you follow it and ship daily
• Excellent written English — weekly progress check-ins required
• Available for 4+ hours overlap with Pacific Time (PST/PDT) daily

== NICE-TO-HAVE ==
• Healthcare or dental marketing experience
• Bing Ads / Microsoft Advertising experience
• Semrush API integration
• CallRail API / webhook experience
• Schema markup implementation (JSON-LD)
• GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)
• YouTube Ads campaign management
• Canadian market experience (local SEO in BC/Western Canada)

== WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT ==
• Complete playbook provided — 400+ pages with exact n8n node configs, API endpoints, Google Ads campaign structures, schema code, and Looker Studio build guide. No guessing.
• Clear scope — you own the intelligence/ads/SEO track exclusively. No scope creep.
• Real ad budgets — rebuilding campaigns for 3 practices with real spend.
• Vendor replacement — you are directly replacing an ad agency and SEO provider. Immediate, measurable impact.
• Direct access to the owner (Dr. Webster) — fast decisions, no bureaucracy.
• Growth potential — ongoing optimization work + new practice rollouts.

== CONTRACT DETAILS ==
Type: Contract (project-based, ~12 weeks, with ongoing maintenance potential)
Estimated scope: ~224 developer hours
Location: 100% Remote
Start Date: Immediate — the playbook is ready, we start building Day 1
Rate: Competitive, based on experience. Please include your hourly rate (USD) in your application.
Payment: Bi-weekly, negotiable

== HOURS & AVAILABILITY ==
40 hours per week is the absolute minimum. This is a full-time commitment.
You may work as many hours per week as you want at your straight hourly rate — no cap. If you want to put in 50, 60, or 70 hours a week to finish faster, we will pay every hour at the same rate.
We reward speed. The faster the system goes live, the faster we exit our current vendors and stop paying for services we no longer need.
Must overlap with Pacific Time (PST/PDT) for at least 4 hours daily.

== BONUS STRUCTURE ==
Speed Bonus: Finish your track ahead of the 12-week target and earn a completion bonus. The earlier you finish (with all checklist items passing QA), the larger the bonus.
Excellence Bonus: Deliver an exceptional outcome — systems that are clean, well-documented, thoroughly tested, and performing above expectations — and earn an additional quality bonus.
Both bonuses stack. Finish early AND deliver exceptional work, and you earn both.

== HOW TO APPLY ==
• Brief introduction — who you are, where you're based, your relevant experience
• Your Google Ads experience (built campaigns from scratch? conversion tracking? offline imports?)
• Your SEO experience (technical audits? schema markup? any AEO/GEO work?)
• Screenshots or links to a Looker Studio dashboard you've built
• Your hourly rate (USD) and availability to start
• Bonus: 2-3 minute Loom video walking through an n8n workflow or ads project you built

The playbook is written. Every API call is documented. We need the automation + ads engineer who can build it. Apply today — the right person starts next week.

Webster Dental Group | Kelowna, BC | AI-Powered Practice Growth
