Develop creative concepts and hooks for short-form performance ads (Meta, TikTok, YouTube Shorts)



Identify winning ad formats, trends, and patterns — and adapt them to multiple brands



Use our internal AI systems (custom Claude projects + prompts) to:

• Rewrite winning formats

• Generate hooks, angles, and scripts

• Adapt concepts per brand, avatar, and market



Manage creative tickets inside our Notion system (idea flow, briefs, feedback loops)



Translate strategy into clear, executable briefs for video editors



Ensure concepts follow a proven structure:

Hook ? Problem ? Unique Mechanism ? Proof ? CTA



Review iterations and give sharp, actionable feedback to improve performance



Help ensure our clients always have fresh content feeding the algorithms



?



Must-Have Skills:



Strong understanding of short-form direct-response advertising



Deep intuition for hooks, storytelling, and attention mechanics



Experience working with
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts content



Ability to take a single trend or format and extrapolate multiple scalable concepts



Comfortable working with SOPs, templates, Notion, and AI tools



Strong written English (you’ll write hooks, briefs, and prompts daily)



Clear communicator — able to brief editors and align with performance goals



?



Bonus If You Have:



Experience with e-commerce or DTC performance brands



Familiarity with psychological ad frameworks (AIDA, PAS, JTBD, etc.)



Experience working alongside media buyers or growth teams, editors and graphic designers



Understanding of Meta’s evolving algorithm environment (e.g. Andromeda)



Background in creative strategy, copywriting, or UGC frameworks



?



Who You Are:



You think like a marketer first, creative second



You care about what converts, not just what looks good



You’re trend-driven, curious, and constantly studying what’s working now



You’re systems-minded and efficient (AI is a tool, not a threat)



You take extreme ownership of your work



You bring ideas proactively — you don’t wait to be told what to think



You’re positive, driven, and allergic to mediocrity



?



Job Details:



Hours: 20–40 hrs/week (negotiable)



Long-term position with growth opportunities



Fully remote – work from anywhere



Salary depends on experience

(please include your expected monthly rate in USD)



You’ll work with a young, ambitious, high-performance team

We move fast, test aggressively, and reward people who create impact



?



To Apply:



Only apply via OnlineJobs.ph



When applying, include:

• Examples of ad concepts, hooks, or creative strategy work (if available)

• Your expected monthly salary (USD)

• Your availability (hours/week + timezone)



Use the subject line:

“Creative Strategist – Scales What Converts”

Who We’re Looking For:

title: Social Media Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here: 
/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagHKo8CnRtRpX585/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We are looking for an experienced, passionate, and creative Social Media Manager to join our team! As our Social Media Manager, you will be responsible for implementing our Social Media strategy in order to increase our online presence and strengthen our relationship with our customers and fans. You will be working closely with our Senior Social Media Manager and the remainder of our Marketing department. The platforms that you’ll primarily work on and be responsible for are (1) Instagram, (2)
, and (3) Pinterest. As our Social Media Manager, you will have a meaningful impact on our growth, bottom line, and brand identity in an exciting, design-driven company where being creative is just as important as being analytical.



The ideal candidate excels in building relationships, is passionate about social media and interior design, is a strong writer with a keen visual eye, and thrives on performance-driven teams.



We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will stay and grow at our company. We offer competitive compensation, a good and stable work environment, and plenty of growth opportunities.



PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES



Content Development:



- In partnership with our Senior Social Media Manager and Marketing Team, create and maintain a social media content calendar that supports primary brand stories and goals while also tapping into seasonal 
nts and appropriate trends

- Create original, on-brand social media content that our followers will appreciate

- Content will be a mix of product-related content as well as product-adjacent content (e.g., top sleep tips!)

- Leveraging data, identify UGC and inspiration imagery to be considered for posting

- Write effective content. Work with copywriters and designers to ensure content is informative and appealing

- Keep up to date with current news, pausing content and escalating to leadership where appropriate

- Partner with Marketing and eComm tea
mbers to create shot lists for social media, as needed

- Develop Instagram Stories templates and stickers. Using those templates and Instagram platform elements, create our Instagram Stories



Posting:



- Schedule content for
, Instagram feed, Instagram Stories, and Pinterest, either within the app or by using tools such as Sprout Social or Later

- Post Instagram Stories directly from the Instagram app



Affiliate Marketing & Community Management



- Respond to all engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekdays

- Respond to all urgent engagement and direct messages within 24 hours on weekends

- Respond to engagement during normal US hours (range of acceptable times: 10 pm PH - 9 am PH)

- Author thoughtful, individualized comments and messages in the brand voice in response to comments on our pages, on images where we are tagged or where our product is depicted, and on images posted by brands and people we admire!

- Develop and maintain a live document with common questions and responses

- Adhere to rules and regulations - **no “black hat” social media techniques**! We want to build our brand presence organically



Asset Collection



- Request and gather UGC from our followers and fans in our Airtable database. Request content usage permission for all images that are within our brand guidelines. Follow up via
 or direct message as needed for any assets we are especially eager to share.

- Obtain or verify permissions for any images submitted via direct message,
, influencer collaborations or other means and upload to our visual curation tool, editing beforehand as needed.

- With brand priorities in mind, investigate content leads identified by social media, press, and other means to create a library of aspirational imagery featuring our products



Influencer Marketing



- Identify influencers who we can work with as part of our influencer marketing strategy

- Execute on influencer marketing strategy and management, including cultivating our network of valued influencer partners



Reporting & Strategy



- Assist in regular content performance and competitive reporting and analysis

- Provide ad hoc qualitative social analysis

- Be our in-house expert on social platform updates and trends in social media, interior design, home, and retail, presenting out to the team as needed

- Continuously seek ways to improve processes, recommending any tools or technology needed and subsequently serving as the primary point of contact for the relevant third parties

- Ideate new social activations, such as content series, engagement strategies, contests, and giveaways



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at 



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:



-Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

-Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to learn, grow and develop their careers continuously

-Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented, and committed as you are

title: Google Ads Specialist for $10M/Year Skincare Brand
description:
Are you obsessed with checking Google Ads Manager every day? Do you lose sleep over search impression share, shopping feed quality, and ROAS? Then keep reading.



To apply, send us a message and our Hiring Manager will quickly get back to you.



About our company

We're a 5-year-old e-commerce beauty brand doing $10M per year in Europe. We're a team of 20, and we're now looking to hire one more person to solely focus on improving our Google Ads account. The business growth has been great — but the account has been neglected, and that's the opportunity.



Role overview

You will manage the Google Ads account in close cooperation with the co-founders. You'll have access to image designers, video editors, copywriters, and localizers, everything you need to build the best campaigns of your career.



Your responsibilities

* Ensure the Google Ads account follows best practices

* Own budget allocation and pacing across the full account

* Optimize each campaign type on a recurring weekly basis

* Establish profitable Google Display campaigns to drive sales

* Implement tactics to win "best in test" & review top positions

* Deliver performance reports to the management team

* Run structured A/B tests to improve ad quality over time



The requirements

* Minimum 3–5 years of DTC experience managing Google Ads

* Experience working with skincare/beauty e-commerce brands

* Managed brands doing $0.5M–$1M+ per month in total revenue

* Proven track record of improving a similar brand's performance

* Professional-level written and spoken English



As a person, you are

* Reliable and accountable, you own your numbers

* Detail-oriented and a perfectionist about account hygiene

* Curious for new strategies and hungry for revenue growth



What we offer

* A long-term remote position with a stable, 5-year-old company

* A small Google Ads team with a big passion for online sales

* Opportunity to grow with a fast-scaling e-commerce brand



What we expect in return

* Meaningful improvement in ROAS and a lower CPA over time

* A perfectionist when it comes to maintaining the account

* Drive to learn, openness to feedback, and a team-first mindset



Practical information

Compensation is based on your experience and track record. We'll likely start out with some hours and gradually increase. Preferred working hours is within 8AM - 5PM (CET).

title: Senior Revenue & Pricing Manager (Airbnb / STR Portfolio)
description:
About Us



We are a fast-growing Airbnb management company based in Canada managing 30+ properties, with plans to scale aggressively.



We are looking for a Senior Revenue & Pricing Manager to take full ownership of pricing, occupancy, and revenue performance across our portfolio.



This is a high-impact role directly tied to company growth.



Compensation



$600 USD/month base salary

Additional performance bonuses based on occupancy and revenue growth

Top performers can earn up to $800–$1000/month

Long-term role with growth opportunities



Schedule



4 PM – 12 AM Mountain Time (Canada)

Monday to Sunday (flexible day off)



Role Objective



Maximize bookings and revenue across all properties.



You are not here to manage PriceLabs. You are here to own performance.



Responsibilities



Own pricing strategy across 30+ listings

Manage and optimize PriceLabs (advanced usage)

Monitor booking pace and adjust pricing daily

Identify underperforming listings and take action

Analyze competitors and market demand

Optimize occupancy, ADR, and RevPAR

Adjust minimum stays, discounts, and pricing rules

Work with the team to improve listing performance

Provide weekly performance insights and action plans



KPIs



Occupancy rate (target: 70%+)

Revenue growth month-over-month

Reduction in vacant nights

Response time to underperformance (24–48 hrs)



Requirements



1–3 years experience in Airbnb or STR pricing

Experience managing 10+ listings

Strong experience with PriceLabs

Strong understanding of occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, and booking lead time

Strong analytical thinking

Fluent English

Reliable internet and laptop



What We’re Looking For



Thinks like a revenue manager, not a VA

Takes ownership of results

Makes decisions independently

Understands supply, demand, and seasonality

Can explain why pricing decisions are made



Not a Fit If You



Only use PriceLabs automation

Need constant direction

Have no STR experience

Cannot analyze data or competitors



Bonus



Experience with VRBO or 

Experience managing 20+ listings

Experience with PMS tools (Hospitable, Guesty, etc.)



How to Apply



Send:



Your resume and OnlineJobs profile

A short paragraph explaining your STR pricing experience

Answer this question:



One of our listings has 40% occupancy this month. What steps would you take to improve it?



IMPORTANT



Start your application with the word “Revenue”.

title: Remote Operations Manager | Short-Term Lettings
description:
Evolve Property Partners is a fast-growing short-term lettings and Airbnb management company operating across the UK. We manage a high-performing portfolio of properties with a fully remote team of Virtual Assistants specialising in Guest Services, Maintenance, and Claims. Our systems are mature, our SOPs are documented, and our standards are high. We are now expanding our operations team and looking for a second strong Operations Manager to help us scale.



This is a hands-on remote operations role. The systems are already in place — we need someone who can step in, run the day-to-day with precision, and hold the team to a consistently high standard.



The Role



As Remote Operations Manager, you will work closely with our existing operations leadership and be responsible for managing a dedicated team of Virtual Assistants across Guest Services and Maintenance. You will ensure that every guest interaction is handled promptly and professionally, every maintenance issue is escalated and resolved, and the day-to-day operation runs without fail.



What You Will Be Doing



Guest Services Oversight: You will monitor and audit guest communications across Airbnb, 
, Uplisting, and WhatsApp daily, ensuring the tea
ets our 0 Inbox Rule and every response is timely, professional, and resolved to completion.



VA Team Management: You will oversee a team of Virtual Assistants, conducting daily performance reviews, submitting structured feedback forms, identifying training needs, and addressing underperformance quickly and directly.



Maintenance Coordination: You will run daily check-ins with the Maintenance VA, reviewing the Breezeway task board to ensure all tickets are progressing, urgent jobs are prioritised, and completed work is properly evidenced with photos and notes.



Daily Reporting: You will submit a clear End of Day report to senior leadership each evening, covering guest performance, maintenance updates, any escalations, and key risks — giving full operational visibility with minimal back-and-forth.



Property Pipeline Support: You will assist in tracking new properties moving through onboarding and offboarding pipelines, ensuring every stage progresses without delay and all documentation is in order.



What We Are Looking For



- Short-Term Lettings or Airbnb Management Experience: You have worked in the short-term rental space and understand the urgency of guest communication, review management, and property readiness.

- Remote Team Leadership: You have experience managing Virtual Assistants or remote staff. You know how to audit work, give direct feedback, and hold people to a standard through data and process.

- Systems-Driven: You are comfortable operating within established processes and using data to identify gaps and drive improvements.

- Platform Familiarity: Experience with Uplisting, Breezeway, Airbnb, 
, Asana, and Slack is highly desirable.

- Detail-Oriented and Decisive: You catch things others miss and you act — you do not wait to be told when something needs fixing.



The Opportunity



This is a long-term role with genuine growth potential. As the Evolve Property Partners portfolio continues to expand, there is a clear path toward increased responsibility, team ownership, and progression into a senior operations position. We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the business — not just fill a vacancy.



SKILL REQUIREMENT

- Airbnb Management

- Remote Team Leadership

- Operations Management

- Property Management Systems (Breezeway, Uplisting)

title: Shopify Web Developer - CRO Specialist - Ecommerce Advertising Agency - Full Time 5a
description:
APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED: 





CRO Shopify Web Developer – Job Overview

I am looking for an experienced shopify web developer to help me upgrade client’s checkout processes and execute CRO tests for various ecommerce brands.

In this role you will update Shopify theme templates, develop landing pages using various page builders and html/CSS frameworks, research/install various checkout/bundle applications, and implement A/B tests using testing tools like intelligems.

You will also report on test performance, and provide suggestions for next steps.

This is a full-time opportunity. Training will be provided and you will work directly with me.



About Zack Miller

My name is Zack Miller, and I’ve been a DTC Ecommerce Growth Marketer since 2019. I’ve done everything fro
dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

I’ve contributed to the growth of over 200 ecommerce brands in my agency experience. Now, as an independent growth marketing partner, I work closely with a small number of brands on their new customer acquisition strategy.



Note: All Remote Employees Must Be Available To Work During The Following Business Hours:

Monday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Tuesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Wednesday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Thursday: 9am – 5:30pm EST

Friday: 9am – 5:30pm EST



Roles & Responsibilities

- Develop landing pages using Figma and various WYSYWIG editors including but not limited to Replo and Pagefly.

- Edit product, collection and other page templates using Shopify Liquid template engine, and various HTML/CSS frameworks.

- Install various checkout/tracking applications (aftersell, Zipify OCU, Upstack, etc)

- Install various applications for product bundling when needed, and create product bundles. 

- Install tracking pixels on client’s websites

- Implement A/B tests in intelligems for product price tests, shipping price tests, theme tests, landing page tests, and more. 

- Research new ideas for direct response content marketing strategies.

- Work in my project management system, ClickUp.

- Apply a process-first mentality and provide feedback to help further develop our operating systems.



Required Experience & Education

- Strong verbal and written English language skills (American Dialect)

- Strong knowledge of HTML/CSS/Javascript/Shopify Liquid required. 

- Knowledge of Python and Ruby preferred but not required.

- 1+ years of web development (Shopify) experience required

- 1+ years of backend python (flask/django) development experience preferred but not required

- 1+ years of marketing agency experience preferred but not required

- Must be highly organized and possess strong attention to detail

- All applicants are encouraged to apply, regardless of experience or education



APPLY ON MY WEBSITE TO BE CONSIDERED:

title: Video Editor (Tiktok/Capcut Short form content)
description:
Full-Time Short Form Content Video Editor



We are currently looking for a full-time short-form content video editor to join our growing content team.



This is a stable, long-term position with significant growth potential for the right candidate. Our company specializes in creating high-performing AI-powered content for major brands in the health and home niches, producing large volumes of short-form videos used in modern digital marketing campaigns.



Because we operate directly within these industries, we maintain a strong overview of the market and emerging trends, allowing us to move faster and adapt more effectively than most traditional businesses. Our workflow combines advanced AI tools with professional editing and structured production systems to create content at scale.



AI-generated media has advanced rapidly in recent years, and the realism and quality now achievable with modern tools are transforming the content landscape. Working with us means positioning yourself at the forefront of this technological shift, gaining hands-on experience with workflows that very few teams currently understand or operate efficiently.



We are looking for someone who is reliable, detail-oriented, and committed to producing high-quality short-form videos that meet professional standards. This role requires consistency, discipline, and the ability to follow structured production guidelines.



For candidates who perform well, this position offers long-term stability, increasing responsibility, and opportunities to grow alongside the company as our content operations expand.



Please fill the FORM Below and enter the second stage of hiring:

title: Head of Customer Support (E-commerce) – Full Ownership Role
description:
Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Hours: Full-time (32–40 hours/week)

Working hours: 09:00 – 17:00 CET (Europe time zone)

Salary: Up to $1200/month (based on experience)

Company: Bloomfold (E-commerce Brand)



About Bloomfold : 



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand focused on delivering a premium customer experience across Europe.

Customer support is not just a function for us - it is a key driver of retention, reviews, and long-term brand growth.



We are looking for someone who doesn’t just “do support”, but owns the entire customer support operation.



The Role:

As our Head of Customer Support, you are fully responsible for how customer support is structured, executed, and improved.



You are not just answering tickets — you are building and optimizing a system.



You will:

- Ensure all customer conversations are handled with care, speed, and clarity on all marketplaces we sell and B2B customers

- Take ownership of problems — even when no clear solution exists yet

- Improve workflows, automation, and efficiency

- Monitor and improve key customer support KPIs

- Act as the bridge between customer feedback and internal improvements

- Take full accountability for performance and outcomes



You will start hands-on, but your goal is to optimize, automate, and scale.



Daily Responsibilities:

- Handle all open tickets 
, chat, social, WhatsApp) via Comslayer

- Respond to incoming tickets throughout the day (CET hours)

- Manage and respond to WhatsApp customer support conversations

- Translate and localize responses (EN ? Dutch where needed)

- Investigate customer issues and provide real solutions (not generic replies)

- Handle escalations and complex cases independently

- Maintain a high level of response quality and tone of voice



Ownership & Growth Responsibilities

- Set up and optimize workflows in Comslayer

- Build and manage automation using CommSlayer or similar systems

- Set up, guide, and optimize AI agents for customer support



Create and improve:

- Macros

- Helpdesk structure

- Tagging & categorization



- Identify recurring issues and actively solve root causes

- Work closely with operations, logistics, and marketing to improve CX



KPIs & Reporting (You Own This)



You are responsible for improving, tracking, and reporting on:



- First Response Time (FRT)

- Resolution Time

- Customer Satisfaction (CSAT)

- Ticket volume reduction (through automation & prevention)

- Refund rate (through better support & expectation setting)

- Review score improvements



You will:



- Create clear weekly and monthly reports

- Translate data into actionable improvements

- Take full accountability for performance



What We Expect From You



You are someone who:



- Has proven experience in e-commerce customer support

- Has experience with CommSlayer or similar automation systems

- Has experience or strong understanding of AI agents in customer support

- Understands support KPIs and knows how to improve them

- Thinks in systems, not just tickets

- Is highly accountable and takes ownership

- Is structured, calm, and solution-oriented

- Can handle pressure and make decisions independently

- Can set up reporting and work data-driven

- Communicates clearly in English

- Is available during European working hours (CET)



What Success Looks Like

- Inbox is always under control

- Customers receive fast, clear, and helpful responses

- Fewer repetitive tickets due to automation

- AI and workflows handle a large part of incoming volume

- Recurring issues are identified and solved

- Customer experience improves month over month



Big plus:



- Experience scaling a support team

- Experience with Shopify-based stores



What We Offer

- Full ownership of the customer support department

- No micromanagement - you are responsible for results

- Direct communication with the founders or managers

- Long-term collaboration

- Competitive salary up to $1200/month (based on experience)



How to Apply



To apply for this role, please complete our application form via the link below:







We carefully review all applications. Only candidates who provide clear, structured, and thoughtful answers will be considered.



Please note:



- This role requires ownership, accountability, and problem-solving ability

- We are not looking for basic support agents, but someone who can build and improve systems

- Low-effort or incomplete applications will not be considered



If your application stands out, we will contact you for the next step.

title: Graphic Designer/Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Graphic Designer to join our team! The ideal candidate will specialize in print design — including business cards, brochures, flyers, posters, and large-format materials such as banners and signage.



You’ll be working directly with different clients to bring their ideas to life, ensuring that every design meets both aesthetic and technical print standards. Strong communication skills, reliability, and the ability to stay highly productive during graveyard working hours are essential for this role.



*Key Responsibilities*



• Design and prepare print-ready layouts for various materials: business cards, brochures, flyers, tarpaulins, banners, and other large-format prints.

•Communicate directly with clients to understand their design needs and brand guidelines.

•Collaborate with the production team to ensure color accuracy, print quality, and technical feasibility.

•Manage multiple projects and deadlines while maintaining high design standards.

•Review proofs and samples to ensure precision before printing.

•Stay updated with design trends, printing techniques, and materials.

•Maintain consistent reliability and high productivity throughout the graveyard shift.



*Qualifications*



•Proven experience as a Graphic Designer with a strong portfolio focused on print materials.

•Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign) or equivalent tools.

•Excellent English communication skills — both written and verbal.

•Confident and comfortable in client-facing discussions.

•Highly detail-oriented — an absolute must for print work.

•Strong sense of layout, color, and typography.

•Ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.

•Familiarity with print production processes and specifications (bleed, resolution, CMYK, etc.).

•Knowledge of large-format printing is an advantage.

•Willingness to work the graveyard shift, demonstrating dependability and the ability to maintain exceptional performance during these hours.

CANDIDATES MUST HAVE PRIOR EXPERIENCE IN RETENTION-FOCUSED POSITIONS SUCH AS CUSTOMER SUCCESS REPRESENTATIVE, RETENTION SPECIALIST, OR ACCOUNT MANAGER.

• Submit a short cover letter highlighting your relevant experience

• Include a link to your updated CV/Resume



Note: Applications without a CV/Resume will not be processed





ROLE SUMMARY:

We’re looking for a people-first, proactive Customer Retention Specialist who thrives on building relationships and keeping customers happy long-term.



This is not just a support role — you’ll play a key part in retention, customer satisfaction, and overall experience improvement.



If you enjoy working with customers, solving problems, and making sure customers stay loyal, this role is for you.



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING:

• Build strong relationships with assigned customers and become their trusted point of contact

• Handle customer concerns, questions, and service-related issues

• Proactively check in with customers to ensure satisfaction

• Identify risks early and prevent churn

• Suggest and implement improvements to enhance customer experience

• Work closely with internal teams to resolve issues quickly

• Monitor feedback and identify trends affecting retention

• Assist with onboarding new customers

• Maintain accurate CRM records and updates

• Support renewals and long-term account growth



WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written) - MUST

• Experience In Customer Success, Customer Retention, Account Management, or similar Retention-Driven Roles - MUST

• Experience using CRM or support tools

• Strong relationship-building skills

• Ability to multitask and manage multiple customers

• Problem-solver with strong attention to detail

• Calm and professional under pressure

• Analytical mindset (can understand customer feedback and trends)



WORK SETUP & SCHEDULE:

• Full-time, work-from-home position

• 8 hours per shift, 5 days per week

title: Senior UK Tax & Accounts Manager
description:
Senior UK Tax & Accounts Manager



Remote | Full Ownership Role



We’re a UK-based estate agency and marketing group operating two active limited companies.



We’re looking for someone to take full ownership of accounting, tax, and director extraction across both businesses.



This is a hands-on role with real responsibility. You won’t be assisting, you’ll be running it.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

Inter-company billing and pricing

Monthly bookkeeping and reconciliations

Director salary, dividends, and pension strategy

Corporation tax planning

VAT positioning (if applicable)

HMRC compliance and audit readiness

What Success Looks Like

Clean, accurate numbers every month

Clear guidance on what can be extracted and how

No last-minute surprises at year-end

Efficient, well-managed tax position

The Structure



You’ll oversee two UK limited companies:



An estate agency generating commission income

A marketing agency providing services to the estate agency



You’ll manage how these interact financially and ensure everything is structured properly.



What We’re Looking For

Strong experience with UK limited companies

Confident managing salary, dividends, and pensions for directors

Understanding of inter-company billing and cost allocation

Comfortable taking ownership and making decisions

Able to explain things clearly and simply



You should be confident enough to challenge decisions when needed.



Monthly Expectations



Each month you will:



Reconcile accounts

Confirm profits and liabilities

Identify extraction opportunities

Advise exactly what the director can pay themselves and how

Flag any risks early



Please include:



Your CV

A short note outlining your experience with UK limited companies



Final Note



This role suits someone who enjoys ownership, responsibility, and running things properly.



If that sounds like you, please apply!

title: Order Management Specialist
description:
TO APPLY

If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:


/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagZk1jvydfqYXGy9/form



Applications submitted through onlinejobs.ph will not be reviewed. We look forward to reviewing your application.



TO BE RESPECTFUL OF YOUR TIME, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DO NOT MEET THE JOB REQUIREMENTS. We evaluate against these requirements strictly. If you do not have the requisite experience, please do not apply.



JOB DESCRIPTION



We are looking for an energetic and detail-oriented individual with extensive experience managing customer order flow to join our growing team. As an Order Management Specialist, you will be responsible for processing customer orders and coordinating fulfillment logistics. The ultimate goal is to ensure that customer orders are processed efficiently, accurately and on-time.



As an Order Management Specialist, you will work as a member of our company’s Operations team. To be successful at the role, the ideal candidate must have strong customer service, communication and interpersonal skills. You will work closely with our internal team and our customers (via
 and phone) to fulfill their orders. You can expect to learn a lot about how our business functions, be professionally challenged and have plenty of opportunities for career development!



We are looking for long-term tea
mbers who will stay and grow at our company! Please apply if you have full-time availability and can commit to a long-term, mutually beneficial role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO

- Bring in customer orders daily from various sources, including customer portals, EDI,
s and faxes

- Respond to incoming
s and phone calls with same-day service

- Confirm purchase order changes and make changes to orders in our ERP system

- Maintain accurate documentation of all actions/conversations/issues (through Front and Airtable)

- Release orders/backorders for shipping in a timely fashion

- Organize order releasing for easy picking and communicate with our Warehouse team for shipment alignment

- Create delivery slips and invoice shipped orders

- Upload/enter shipping and invoicing information to customer portals

- Create, send inventory, shipping and invoicing EDI documents

- Handle payment issues, solve order-related problems and interact with account managers as needed

- Interact with customers and provide them with information on order-related questions (such as inventory availability) and product inquiries

- Understand and ensure departmental KPIs, objectives, and guidelines are followed

- Ensure customer SLAs are followed

- Work on other duties as assigned



WHO YOU ARE

- A Bachelor's Degree

- 1-3 years experience with order management, data entry and customer service

- Excellent verbal and written communication skills; additionally, strong interpersonal skills, particularly in a customer-facing capacity

- EDI experience

- Excellent attention to detail

- Strong organizational skills; self-motivated and proactive

- MS Excel ability

- Excellent English skills

- Ability to work with our US team via
, Slack and Zoom. Highly preferred, but not required: experience with Airtable and Notion

- Positive, kind and easy to work with

- A team player mentality - one team, one dream!

- Positive and kind

- A desire to learn and grow within our organization

- Willingness to learn and adopt new tools

- Reliable and detailed-oriented

- Stable, trustworthy highly dependable. Ideally someone seeking a long-term relationship where we can both grow from the relationship



HOURS

Fixed Schedule, M-F, US Central Time



ABOUT HIEND ACCENTS

HiEnd Accents creates designer bedding and home decor. Founded by a husband-wife team in 2005, we remain a family business today. Our customers love our unique designs across a wide range of styles, everyday luxury pricing and commitment to excellent service. We sell on both a wholesale as well as retail basis and are based in Irving, TX.



WHY HIEND ACCENTS?

Our small size and fast-paced culture reward people who act and think like owners. If you're someone who has a growth mentality, strives for exceptionalism, are a committed professional and a straight shooter, you’ll fit in with our culture and go far with our company.



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

- Competitive Compensation - We offer a highly competitive compensation package, including 13th Month Pay

- Professional Growth - We invest in our people and make sure that they have the opportunity to continuously learn, grow and develop their careers

- Great Team of Like-Minded Professionals - We prioritize hiring based on culture and values, so you’re working with a team of folks who are as fun, talented and committed as you are

title: Pinterest Manager
description:
HOW TO APPLY



If this opportunity feels like the perfect fit for you and you meet the job qualifications, we invite you to learn more about our HiEnd Accents team in the Philippines and submit your application here:




/appzq4iqeIREQRVyo/pagIckNnVuKAYhim2/form



Please note: Only applications submitted via this link will be considered.



Job Description



We’re hiring a Pinterest Manager to take full ownership of our Pinterest presence and turn it into a high-performing sales channel.



This role owns both organic Pinterest growth and Pinterest Ads performance, with a strong focus on turning Pinterest into a scalable paid acquisition channel.



This is not a generic social media role—we’re looking for someone who deeply understands how the Pinterest platform works, from its search algorithm and Smart Feed to pin formats, trends, and conversion paths. Your goal: drive meaningful traffic and sales from Pinterest through smart, strategic execution.



Mission Statement: Build and scale a Pinterest strategy that doesn’t just look good—but performs. You will grow impressions, increase outbound clicks, and **drive profitable revenue through both organic content and paid Pinterest campaigns.



Primary Responsibilities





Pinterest Organic Strategy & Execution



- Develop and execute a Pinterest-specific strategy rooted in platform best practices and SEO.

- Stay on top of Pinterest’s evolving algorithm, features (e.g., Idea Pins, video), and trends to keep us ahead of the curve.

- Use keyword research and SEO to craft high-converting titles, descriptions, and hashtags.

- Align Pinterest strategy with seasonal campaigns, product launches, and key retail 
nts.

- Build and maintain a structured Pinterest keyword library to support ongoing SEO efforts.

- Leverage Pinterest keyword insights to inform both organic content and paid targeting.



Pinterest Ads Strategy & Execution



- Plan, launch, and manage Pinterest ad campaigns to drive traffic, conversions, and revenue.

- Develop a full-funnel Pinterest strategy that integrates organic content and paid amplification.

- Own campaign structure across prospecting, retargeting, and catalog sales campaigns.

- Manage budgets, bids, and pacing to hit performance targets.

- Continuously test audiences, creatives, and campaign types to improve efficiency.

- Partner with the eCommerce and analytics teams to ensure proper tracking and attribution.

- Scale winning campaigns while maintaining target CPA/ROAS goals.



Content Creation & Scheduling



- Design and publish optimized pins (static, video, Idea Pins) that speak to our target customer and drive clicks.

- Build and maintain organized boards with strategic themes and branding.

- Manage publishing cadence based on performance data and best practices through Tailwind, Pinterest Scheduler, or similar tools.

- Ensure all pins are visually on-brand and aligned with HiEnd Accents’ positioning.



Performance Analytics & Optimization



- Track and report on KPIs weekly/monthly: outbound clicks, saves, conversions, CTR.

- Run A/B tests on creative, formats, and timing to improve pin performance.

- Continuously refine strategy based on what the algorithm favors and what drives the best ROI.

- Monitor and optimize for downstrea
trics such as assisted conversions and revenue contribution where available.

- Monitor competitor activity and emerging Pinterest trends within the home and interior space.



Cross-Functional Coordination



- Collaborate with our marketing, design, and eCommerce teams to align Pinterest with overall brand goals.

- Repurpose and adapt content for Pinterest from broader campaigns and launches.

- Identify and surface high-potential UGC or inspiration imagery for Pinterest use.



Requirements



- Have 2+ years of hands-on Pinterest Ads and organic Pinterest experience** for a brand or eCommerce business.

- Demonstrated experience managing Pinterest Ads Manager, including campaign structure, audience targeting, and bid optimization.

- Comfortable working with performance data, dashboards, and attribution reporting.

- Passion for interior design, home décor, or lifestyle brands preferred.

- Experience working with luxury, premium, or design-driven brands is a strong plus.

- Must be able to collaborate during overlapping US business hours as needed.

- Understand how Pinterest works as a visual search engine, not just a social platform.

- Have a strong portfolio or case studies that show you’ve driven real traffic and sales from Pinterest**.

- Are skilled with Pinterest SEO, keyword research, and algorithm-based strategies.

- Know your way around Tailwind, Canva, Photoshop, and Pinterest Analytics.

- Are detail-oriented, self-directed, and results-focused.

- Bonus: experience with affiliate marketing, *
 capture from Pinterest, or using Pinterest for DTC sales.

- Please include links to Pinterest accounts, boards, or case studies you have directly managed.



About HiEnd Accents



HiEnd Accents designs and creates everyday luxury bedding and linens, sheeting, decorative pillows and other home textiles. Founded in 2005 and based in Dallas, Texas, our mission is to elevate our customers' lives via beautifully designed home textiles that deliver quality and value.



As a family-owned business, we’re committed to personal service and long-term relationships. Through our four brands, we offer unique designs across a spectrum of styles and price points, all united by exceptional value. Combined with our customer-first approach, prompt shipping and low order minimums, we’ve become the preferred bedding supplier for thousands of top department stores, furniture retailers, interior designers, and boutique hotels nationwide. Recently recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing businesses in the US, we continue to innovate and expand our reach in the home textiles market.



Discover more about us and our brands at [
](
).



Want to get to know us better and learn what it’s like to be part of our growing team in the Philippines? Learn more here: 
/hea-ph-team



Why HiEnd Accents?



At HiEnd Accents, we're a close-knit team driven by entrepreneurial spirit, growth mindset, and a shared commitment to excellence. Our collaborative approach has propelled us to new heights – we're proud to be recognized on the 2024 INC 5000 list as one of the fastest-growing small companies in the United States. This achievement is a testament to our team's dedication and the exciting opportunities ahead. If you thrive in a vibrant, high-paced culture where your contributions truly matter, we want to hear from you!



Working at HiEnd Accents means that you can expect the following:

title: Senior Full-Stack Engineer
description:
- About BaseOne

BaseOne is a data and AI-driven solutions company based in London, United Kingdom. We build design-led, data-driven products — from enterprise analytics platforms and AI automation tools to consumer-facing health and fitness apps.



Our product portfolio includes:

AI-powered consumer platforms — subscription apps combining personalised AI experiences with commerce



B2B SaaS products — coaching and client management tools for professionals



Enterprise data & analytics — dashboards, data integration, and predictive analytics for large organisations



AI & automation — conversational AI, agentic workflows, and intelligent process automation



Primer Accelerator — our pre-built data platform for PMO and project controls



We're a small, high-output team that blends strategy, design, and engineering in-house. We ship real products, not decks.



- The Role

We're looking for a senior full-stack engineer to work across multiple products and codebases. You'll ship features end-to-end — web, mobile, API, database, AI integrations — and move between projects as priorities shift.



You'll work directly with our founder, own meaningful chunks of each product, and have real influence over technical decisions. 



AI-assisted development (Claude Code, agentic workflows) is a core part of how we build.



This is a hands-on, high-autonomy role. You'll need to context-switch, pick things up fast, and deliver without hand-holding.



- What You'll Work On

Consumer app features — AI-powered personalisation, content generation, tracking, social/gamification



SaaS platform — dashboards, client management, plan assignment, messaging, check-ins



AI integrations — LLM-powered features, prompt engineering, streaming, function calling (OpenAI + Anthropic)



Commerce & affiliate systems — product catalogues, recommendations, click tracking



Data & analytics products — dashboards, data visualisation, real-time reporting



Mobile apps — React Native / Expo with web feature parity



Platform quality — accessibility, security, compliance, performance



The mix will shift depending on what's shipping. Flexibility matters more than specialism.



- Tech Stack

Frontend: Next.js, React, React Native (Expo), TailwindCSS



Backend: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, REST APIs



AI: OpenAI + Anthropic (Claude)



Payments: Stripe, RevenueCat



Infrastructure: Turborepo monorepos, Railway, EAS Build



Language: TypeScript throughout



Testing: Vitest, Playwright



Analytics: PostHog, custom dashboards



- What We're Looking For

Must Have;

5+ years building production web apps with React and TypeScript



Strong Next.js experience (App Router, API routes, SSR)



Comfortable with PostgreSQL — migrations, schema design, query optimisation



Experience integrating AI/LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, or similar)



Solid API design skills — auth, validation, error handling, rate limiting



Testing discipline — unit, integration, E2E



Comfortable context-switching across multiple products



Can work autonomously with clear scope and minimal oversight



- Nice to Have

React Native / Expo experience



Supabase or similar BaaS



AI-assisted development workflows (Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot)



Data visualisation / dashboard experience (D3, Recharts, Power BI embeds)



SaaS subscription patterns (tiering, feature gating, billing)



Wearable / IoT integrations



WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility



UK GDPR / data compliance awareness



- How We Work

Small team, high trust, fast shipping



AI-augmented development — agentic tooling built into the workflow



Architecture-first — we agree on contracts before coding



Monorepo patterns with shared types and design tokens



Quality gates on every piece of work — build, lint, type-check, tests



Phase-based delivery with clear scope docs



- What You'll Get

Direct collaboration with the founder — short feedback loops, real influence



Variety — multiple products, not the same CRUD app forever



AI tooling that genuinely accelerates your output



Well-documented, well-architected codebases



Ownership of meaningful features across the portfolio



- Working Arrangement

Fully remote



Part-time to start



Opportunity to move to full-time



- To Apply

Send us:

Your CV or portfolio



A brief note on why this interests you



Links to relevant shipped products



Your availability and rate/salary expectations



Contact: 



We look forward to hearing from you
salary: Please let us know your desired salary

Work full-time US business hours

Prior experience in appointment setting, cold calling, or customer service



Experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) for pipelines, notes, and workflows

title: Senior Analyst, CFO Services
description:
Senior Analyst, CFO Services



Company: Ensign Partners

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Full-time, Long-term role



Ensign Partners brings simplicity to complexity by integrating financial, tax, insurance, and advisory expertise under one roof. Our clients receive one coordinated plan, one trusted team, and a clear path forward.

We are a values-driven firm built on professionalism, trust, and long-term relationships. Every role at Ensign matters. We believe exceptional client experiences are created through consistency, accuracy, and people who take pride in doing things the right way. We are growing and looking for a highly experienced financial planning professional to join our team.



About the Role 



We are seeking a highly organized, analytical, and proactive Sr Analyst, CFO Services to support our CFO Services team. This role blends capital execution with enterprise value growth, helping clients both secure financing and increase the long-term value of their businesses. 



You will play a critical role in preparing clients for funding, managing lender relationships, and driving structured value-building initiatives using proven frameworks. This position is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of finance, strategy, and execution. 



Key Responsibilities :



Capital Strategy & Execution 



Client Financing Support 

*Guide clients through financing, refinancing, and capital events  

*Identify capital readiness gaps and proactively recommend solutions  

*Align financing strategies with CFO guidance and client financial plans  



Lender Package Preparation 

*Assemble complete lender packages (financials, projections, supporting documentation)  

*Ensure all submissions follow SOPs and meet quality standards  

*Prepare executive-level financial summaries for lender review  



Pipeline & Timeline Management 

*Track loan applications, underwriting progress, and funding timelines  

*Maintain visibility into all capital milestones and deadlines  

*Escalate risks, delays, or issues promptly  



Lender & Client Coordination 

*Coordinate document collection from clients  

*Manage lender communications and relationships  

*Maintain detailed communication logs and documentation  



Systems & Reporting 

*Update CRM systems (e.g., Zoho) with all capital-related activity  

*Ensure all updates, notes, and deliverables are documented same-day  



Value Creation & Strategic Advisory 



Value Builder Framework Execution 

*Support implementation of Key Drivers of Enterprise Value across clients  

*Maintain Value Builder assessments, scorecards, and tracking plans  

*Help clients understand and act on key value drivers  



Performance & Value Analysis 

*Analyze gaps in profitability, scalability, and valuation  

*Identify and recommend strategic value-building initiatives  

*Align initiatives with financial forecasts and long-term strategy  



KPI Tracking & Reporting 

*Track and report on KPIs tied to enterprise value drivers  

*Maintain dashboards and performance reports for quarterly reviews  

*Ensure progress is measurable, visible, and updated regularly  



Client Engagement & Execution 

*Prepare materials for quarterly CFO and strategy meetings  

*Coordinate follow-ups on client initiatives and action items  

*Track implementation progress and ensure accountability  



Risk & Accountability Management 

*Escalate stalled initiatives, missed milestones, or risks  

*Ensure all client activities and progress are documented and tracked  



What Success Looks Like 

*Clients successfully secure financing without delays or incomplete submissions  

*Clear visibility into all capital processes, timelines, and lender interactions  

*Measurable improvement in client enterprise value and key performance metrics  

*Value-building initiatives are executed, tracked, and aligned with strategy  

*Strong coordination across clients, lenders, CFO, and internal teams  



Qualifications 

*Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Business, or related field (preferred)  

*2+ years of experience in finance, banking, lending, FP&A, or advisory services  

*Strong understanding of financial statements, lending processes, and capital structures  

*Experience with financial modeling, KPI tracking, and performance analysis  

*Excellent organization and project management skills  

*Strong communication and client-facing abilities  

*Experience with CRM/project tools (Zoho or similar preferred)  



Core Competencies 

*Ownership & accountability  

*Strong attention to detail and execution discipline  

*Analytical thinking and problem-solving  

*Proactive communication and follow-through  

*Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines  

*Continuous improvement mindset  



Core Values You Embody at Ensign Partners:

-Enjoy the Journey – You bring steadiness, positivity, and professionalism to your work.

-Move the Cheese – You anticipate needs and adapt as processes evolve.

-Be Your Best – You care deeply about accuracy, presentation, and follow-through.

-Aim to Win – You take ownership and see tasks through without constant oversight.

-Raise the Bar – High standards come naturally to you.

-Keep Your Word – You do what you say you will do, every time.

-Stronger as One – You collaborate well and understand your role supports the whole team.



Why Join Ensign Partners, Ensign Partners is intentional about building a workplace where people are trusted, supported, and held to high standards. This role is essential to delivering the consistent, high-quality experience our commercial clients expect.



Joining Ensign means:

-Being part of a mission-driven, people-first firm

-Working in a professional, organized, and collaborative environment

-Having clear expectations and the ability to take pride in your work

-Contributing meaningfully to a growing and respected organization

-If you are detail-driven, experienced in commercial insurance servicing, and committed to delivering accurate and responsive client support, we encourage you to apply and become part of the Ensign Partners team.



IMPORTANT: Instructions When Applying



Please follow these instructions carefully. They exist to filter serious candidates.



1. Do NOT
 us directly.

If you
 us outside of this job post, you will be automatically disqualified.



2. Your subject line must be:  SR Analyst



3. In your application, include ALL of the following:

-Describe your experience as it relates to this role in detail.

-Provide examples of U.S.-based firms you’ve worked with.

-Your English proficiency level



PAY WILL DEPEND ON LEVEL OF EXPERIENCE.

Work hours will be full time US (Arizona-based) business hours.

title: Direct Response Video Editor (German-Speaking) - Remote
description:
About the Role:

We're one of the fastest-growing direct-to-consumer supplement brands in the DACH market, with over 30,000 active customers and millions in revenue. We're scaling our creative team and looking for a high-caliber video editor to own our Meta ad output.



This is not an agency gig. You'll go deep on one brand, see the direct impact of your work on revenue, and have a clear path to leading the creative function.



Responsibilities:

- Edit 15-25+ direct response ad variations per week across hooks, bodies, and CTAs

- Work with UGC footage, AI-generated voiceovers, and animated content

- Integrate AI tools into daily editing workflows (voiceover generation, animated ads, AI-assisted editing)

- Tailor pacing and creative approach to diverse audience segments

- Partner with creative strategists and copywriters to execute high-performing scripts

- Review ad performance metrics and iterate rapidly on winning concepts



Qualifications:

- Demonstrated track record editing direct response video ads

- Native or fluent German proficiency (DACH market focus)

- Hands-on experience with AI-powered creative tools, or a strong drive to adopt them

- Data-oriented mindset - you understand ROAS, CTR, and what makes ads convert

- Ambition to grow into a Lead Editor or Creative Lead role



What We Offer:

- Full-time remote position with flexible working hours

- Competitive compensation with performance-based bonuses

- Leadership track - grow into Lead Editor / Creative Lead within 6-12 months

- Direct collaboration with the founder

- Focused, fast-moving team that ships daily



How to Apply:

- Along with your application, please include a short Loom video (3-5 minutes) where you walk through 2-3 direct response ads you've edited. Show us the work, explain the strategy behind it, and highlight what drove results. Experience with AI voiceover or AI-generated video is a strong plus.

title: Virtual Assistant & Short Form UGC Video Editor (Gig Based Growth Role)
description:
I am looking for a reliable and detail oriented Virtual Assistant who can support both short form content editing and structured outreach activities for my UGC business and financial services brand. This role is designed for someone who is comfortable with repetitive systems and performance based growth.



The goal of this position is to help remove operational friction from my day to day workflow so I can stay focused on content creation, client communication, and closing deals.



Over time, this role has the opportunity to grow into larger editing projects including long form YouTube content and broader workflow management responsibilities as business volume increases.



Core Responsibilities:

- Edit short form UGC videos between 15-120 seconds using provided raw footage, briefs, and templates

- Add captions, pacing cuts, light sound effects, and background music aligned with brief/platform trends

- Send daily outreach and follow up messages to brands using structured copy paste templates

- Start daily outreach conversations for financial services using provided scripts

- Maintain simple tracking updates on completed tasks and outreach volume



Minimum Monthly Output Expectations:

Edit at least 12 short form videos per month

Send at least 1,000 UGC outreach
s per month

Start at least 1,000 financial outreach conversations per month



Compensation Structure:

$3 per edited short form video

$3 per 50 UGC outreach
s sent

$3 per 50 financial outreach conversations started



Performance Bonuses:

$5 bonus each time your UGC outreach results in a secured brand deal with signed brief & contract

$3 bonus each time a qualified financial appointment is successfully scheduled on my calendar by you

$25 bonus each time a scheduled financial appointment by you converts into a client



A qualified appointment means the prospect is what I call a 4-5 pointer, confirms a real time, attends the call, or properly reschedules.



Estimated Monthly Base Range:

$140 to $200 depending on output consistency

Additional bonus earnings possible based on results



Growth Path:

Opportunity to move into higher paid editing projects

Potential long form YouTube editing work

Potential outreach management leadership role as systems scale

Potential social media management leadership role as systems scale



This role is ideal for someone who values consistency, effective communication, and long term growth rather than short term hourly work.

title: Unit Manager
description:
About the role



Seeking an exceptional Unit Manager to join the thriving team at AXA Philippines' Lingayen Pangasinan branch. As a Unit Manager, you will play a vital role in driving the success of our banking and financial services operations, managing a dynamic team, and delivering exceptional customer experiences. This is a full-time position based in Lingayen Pangasinan.



What you'll be doing

- Overseeing the day-to-day operations of your team, ensuring efficient and effective service delivery

- Recruiting, training, and developing a high-performing team of financial professionals

- Setting and achieving ambitious sales targets, driving revenue growth and client acquisition

- Fostering a positive, customer-centric culture within your unit

- Analysing performance data and implementing strategies to optimise operations and enhance profitability

- Collaborating with cross-functional teams to support the overall objectives of the organisation

- Ensuring compliance with all relevant regulations and internal policies



What we're looking for

- Minimum 1 years of experience in a management or leadership role within the banking or financial services industry

- Strong understanding of the local and regional financial services landscape, including products, regulations, and customer trends

- Proven track record of building and leading successful teams, with excellent people management and coaching skills

- Excellent sales and negotiation abilities, with a demonstrated ability to achieve ambitious targets

- Adaptable and innovative, with the ability to implement data-driven solutions to drive operational efficiencies

- Strong financial acumen and problem-solving skills

- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage effectively with both internal and external stakeholders

- Bachelor's degree required as the minimum education qualification for this position



What we offer



At AXA Philippines, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. In addition to a competitive salary and bonus structure, we offer a comprehensive benefits package that includes:



• Career development opportunities and ongoing training

• Generous health and wellness benefits

• Flexible work arrangements and a healthy work-life balance

• Collaborative and inclusive company culture



About us



AXA Philippines is a leading provider of insurance and financial services, committed to empowering our customers to live better lives. With a strong presence in Lingayen Pangasinan and across the Philippines, we are dedicated to delivering innovative solutions and exceptional customer service. Join our talented team and be a part of our ongoing success story.



Apply now here 
 , applicants who fail to complete and submit the required form will be considered for the position. 



Incomplete or missing submissions will automatically result in disqualification from the recruitment process.

title: Architectural Finishes & Procurement Coordinator (Remote | Full-Time)
description:
Competitive Pay | Growth Opportunity | Work with U.S. Real Estate Company



About Us

We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate development company focused on high-quality home renovations and new construction projects in California.



We don’t just build homes — we build efficient systems, strong teams, and scalable operations.



We’re looking for a detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable tea
mber who can help us manage finishes, materials, and procurement across multiple projects.

______________________________________________________



Why This Role is Important

This role is the backbone of our construction operations. If materials are late, wrong, or missing, projects get delayed.



Your job is to make sure that NEVER happens.

______________________________________________________



What You’ll Be Doing

Finish & Plan Coordination

     -Review architectural drawings and finish schedules

     -Identify required materials (flooring, tiles, cabinets, fixtures, lighting, appliances)

     -Help recommend finish options when needed



Procurement & Purchasing

     -Request and compare vendor quotes

     -Analyze pricing, availability, and lead times

     -Create purchase orders

     -Confirm orders with vendors



Delivery & Logistics Tracking

     -Track all material deliveries and shipments

     -Monitor lead times and backorders

     -Coordinate delivery schedules with project timelines



Project Support

     -Maintain procurement tracking sheets (Google Sheets / Excel)

     -Coordinate with project managers, vendors, and team

     -Proactively flag risks and delays (VERY IMPORTANT)



What We’re Looking For

Required

     -Degree in Architecture, Interior Design, Construction, or related field

     -At least 2+ years experience working with construction drawings or projects

     -Strong ability to read plans (floor plans, elevations, finish schedules, etc.)

     -Highly organized and detail-oriented

     -Strong English communication (written & verbal)



Preferred (Big Plus)

     -Experience in U.S. residential construction

     -Knowledge of materials (tile, flooring, cabinets, plumbing fixtures, lighting)

     -Experience sourcing or purchasing construction materials



Tools You May Use

     -AutoCAD / Revit

     -SketchUp

     -Bluebeam

     -Google Sheets / Excel



How to Apply (IMPORTANT)

To be considered, submit:

     -Your resume

     -A short summary of your experience with construction drawings

     -Example project(s) you’ve worked on

     -Photo of your workstation

     -screenshot of your device specifications

     -screenshot of your internet speed test results

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Job Summary

We are seeking a proactive, organized, and dependable Administrative Assistant to support our executives or supervisors in a remote work environment. The ideal candidate will excel in managing meetings, sending invites, updating schedules, taking detailed notes, and following up on action items until they are completed. This role requires strong communication, time management, and multitasking abilities, along with a high level of professionalism and discretion.



Key Responsibilities

• Attend meetings, take accurate notes, and provide reminders and follow-ups on discussed action items

• Send meeting invites, manage schedules, and update calendars to ensure all appointments and deadlines are met

• Proactively follow up with executives or supervisors and tea
mbers to ensure tasks are completed

• Maintain organized calendars, manage schedules, and coordinate appointments

• Answer
s on behalf of executives or supervisors, or assist with drafting, reviewing, and managing
 correspondence as directed

• Handle sensitive and confidential information with integrity

• Prioritize tasks, manage multiple assignments simultaneously, and meet deadlines

• Communicate effectively, both verbally and in writing, with executives or supervisors and colleagues

• Support executives or supervisors with project coordination, including planning, execution, and follow-up

• Collaborate with other departments to ensure smooth coordination of tasks and projects

• Utilize office software and collaboration tools such as Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Planner, Power Automate, Microsoft Office, Cisco IP Communicator, Google Workspace, and CRM systems to manage daily tasks and workflows

• Demonstrate flexibility and adaptability to changing priorities and business needs



Required Traits and Skills

• Strong organizational and time-management skills

• High attention to detail and accuracy

• Clear and professional verbal and written communication

• Ability to prioritize effectively and meet deadlines

• Discretion and confidentiality when handling sensitive information

• Proactive mindset with the ability to anticipate needs

• Tech-savvy, with experience using collaboration and productivity tools and the ability to quickly learn new systems

• Dependable, reliable, and consistent

• Strong multitasking and problem-solving abilities

• Professional demeanor in all interactions

• Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams

• Critical thinking and sound decision-making skills

• Ethical integrity and professionalism

• Experience with basic project coordination and follow-ups

• Resilience and adaptability in a fast-paced environment



Preferred Qualifications

• 5+ years of experience as an Administrative Assistant

• Experience working remotely and using tools such as Microsoft Teams, Microsoft Planner, Power Automate, or similar platforms

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision



Schedule & Availability

• Sunday to Friday work schedule (50 hours)

• Day off: Saturday

• Primary hours: (US EST Time)

12:00 PM to 4:00 PM on Sunday (4 hours).

8:00 AM to 7:00 PM (10 hours, with a 1-hour lunch). from Monday to Thursday

8:00 AM to 3:00 PM (6 hours, with a 1-hour lunch) Friday



Pay: 10,000 to 40,000 PHP per month, depending on qualifications.





• Please apply only if you are willing and able to work this schedule and extended hours when requested



::Note::

Please send a link to your resume in Word or PDF format only, along with a voice recording explaining why you believe we should hire you, and your Speedtest result from Speedtest.net. Your application will be ignored if these requirements are not submitted.

title: Remote Sales Manager
description:
Remote Sales Manager



Position Title: Inside Sales Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m. (US Eastern Time)

Pay: depending on your experience and qualifications.



About the Role

We are seeking a high-energy, growth-driven Inside Sales Manager to lead and scale our outbound and inbound sales teams in the Philippines. This role is pivotal to our 10X growth strategy and will be responsible for recruiting, training, scripting, and continuously developing a high-performing remote and onsite sales force.



Key Responsibilities

• Build and manage two distinct departments: Outbound and Inbound Sales.

• Recruit, onboard, and train remote and onsite sales reps.

• Develop and refine sales scripts, objection handling, and closing techniques.

• Implement ongoing training programs and performance coaching.

• Set, track, and achieve clear performance metrics (KPIs) for teams and individuals, create dashboards/reports and drive data-backed improvements.

• Monitor pipeline health, conversion rates, AHT, contact rates, and revenue per rep.

• Collaborate with leadership to align sales strategy with company growth goals.

• Foster a culture of accountability, energy, and excellence.



Qualifications

• 5–10 years of experience in inside sales leadership, preferably in BPO or high-volume environments.

• Proven track record of scaling teams and delivering revenue growth.

• Strong understanding of remote team dynamics and call center operations.

• Excellent communication, coaching, and analytical skills.

• Experience with CRM systems (preferably Infor CRM/Saleslogix) and sales-enablement tools.

• Hands-on experience creating KPI frameworks, setting targets, and managing to those metrics.



Preferred Traits

• Energetic and motivational leadership style.

• Strategic thinker with a hands-on approach.

• Familiarity with the Philippine market and workforce culture.

title: Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer
description:
Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer



Job Description



A US-based manufacturing company is looking for a qualified Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer  to join our team. We are a recognized leader in the design and manufacture of ergonomic, interactive technical products for various industries.



Our customers include medical/healthcare, public safety/mission control, all government agencies, IT, and cleanroom ergonomic products.



Required Professional Skills:

Produce accurate 2D and 3D shop drawings to adequately show and dimension all machined sheet metal welded, assembly parts, part numbers, specifications for bends, welding, assembly, etc.

Develop and maintain bill of materials and manufacturing documents.

Produce drawings using AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor software

Drafting and design responsibilities would include incorporating modifications into existing designs, developing component models and scaling fabrication drawings from initial concept.

Evaluate existing designs and processes and provide recommendations for improving productivity and increasing efficiency throughout.

Work with managers to solve problems and offer ideas for improving processes



Requirements:

Must be proficient with AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor (2007+) software

This individual must be self-motivated and able to perform routine duties with some supervision.

Experience in sheet metal fabrication and machine shop environment is preferred

Experience in metal casting and plastic molding is an advantage.

Follow verbal and written instructions



Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D are required.



Schedule: Monday to Friday, from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. US EST, with a one-hour lunch break



NOTE: Please read!!!

Please send a link to your resume in PDF or Word format and your Teams account. Please submit your application if you are proficient in Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Job Title: Remote SEO Specialist

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Job Overview:

We are seeking a results-driven SEO Specialist with strong expertise in search engine optimization, keyword strategy, and digital growth. The ideal candidate will be responsible for improving website rankings, increasing organic traffic, and optimizing overall search performance. This role requires hands-on experience in keyword research, on-page and off-page SEO, technical optimization, and performance tracking.

In addition, the candidate should have a creative eye for improving digital assets such as websites, catalogs, and marketing materials. The role will also involve supporting the manager in ensuring virtual employees are assigned daily tasks and meeting performance expectations.



Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and implement effective SEO strategies to improve search rankings and visibility

• Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and identify growth opportunities

• Optimize website content, meta tags, images, and site structure for SEO performance

• Execute on-page and off-page SEO, including link-building strategies

• Monitor website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs

• Analyze traffic, rankings, and user behavior to provide actionable insights

• Collaborate with developers and designers to improve technical SEO and website performance

• Support content creation by ensuring SEO best practices are followed

• Manage local SEO efforts to improve visibility in targeted regions

• Assist with PPC campaigns (Google Ads,
 Ads) when needed

• Stay up to date with SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices

• Provide recommendations to improve website design, catalogs, and marketing materials

• Assist in ensuring remote tea
mbers have daily tasks and are meeting objectives



Requirements:

• Proven experience as an SEO Specialist or similar role

• Strong knowledge of SEO tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, Screaming Frog, etc.)

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

• Experience with CMS platforms such as WordPress and Shopify

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Excellent communication and time management skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and meet deadlines

• Willing to work US EST hours (8:30 AM to 5:30 PM, Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour lunch break)

• Willing to use time tracking tools and remote desktop access



Preferred Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Digital Media, Business, or related field

• Certifications in Google Analytics, Google Ads, or SEO-related programs

• Experience in e-commerce, B2B, or SaaS industries

• Basic knowledge of graphic design tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva) is a plus



Application Requirements:

If interested, please send the following:
